Zh: “警官，我的想象力很丰富。”他又笑了起来。“就像我说的，我懂得怎么舞文弄墨。这就足够了。不需要理解政治。”

En: But you need to believe in *something*. Freedom, the people, Revachol or even money...
Zh: “但你总要相信*什么*吧。自由，平等，瑞瓦肖，或者甚至是钱……”

En: I believe everyone has the right to think and do whatever they want. Even if it's nothing at all. I'm very *adaptable*.
Zh: “我相信每个人的想法和行动都是自由的。即便这根本算不上什么。我是个*适应性*很强的人。”

En: Just easier that way, he nods in approval. "Besides, life isn't as black and white as René's of the World try to make it seem. It's all shades of grey really."
Zh: “这样更简单一些，”他点头表示赞同。“再说，生活并不像雷内试图展现的那么非黑即白。它其实是灰色的。”

En: *Mon dieu*... the carabineer closes his eyes, like he's never going to open them again.
Zh: “*我的天啦*……”老兵闭上双眼，似乎再也不想睁开。

En: 'Where were we' -- what a joyous way of putting it.
Zh: ‘我们在哪’——这是一种多么欢乐的说法。

En: There he stands. Proud, rigid, and alone, like a cracking marble statue.
Zh: 他就站在那里。骄傲、僵硬而孤独，就像一尊大理石雕像。

En: Really? You know *absolutely* nothing?
Zh: “真的吗？你*什么*都不知道？”

En: Let me think... He looks at the clouds, wistfully. "I heard someone was hanged and left on a tree for a week, but that's all I know really."
Zh: “让我想想……”他渴望地看向天上的云彩。“我听说有人被吊死了，在树上挂了整整一星期，不过我就知道这么多。”

En: Shame. Maybe you can help me with something else then.
Zh: “真丢脸。不过，也许你能帮我做点别的。”

En: Of course, officer, I mean I hope I can. He nods enthusiastically. "What's on your mind?"
Zh: “当然，警官，我是说希望我可以。”他热情地点点头。“你在想什么呢？”

En: No, I'm sorry. And I really *would* like to assist, he adds, smiling apologetically. "You are a good guy, officer. I can see that."\n
Zh: “不，我很抱歉。而且我真的*很想*帮你，”他补充了一句，脸上露出歉意的笑容。“你们都是好人。我能看出来。”

En: No, officers, I'm sorry. And I really *would* like to assist, he adds, smiling apologetically. "You are both good guys. I can see that."
Zh: “不，警官，我很抱歉。而且我真的*很想*帮你，”他补充了一句，脸上露出歉意的笑容。“你们都是好人。我能看出来。”

En: Then help them, you wimp. Reproach fills his eyes. "You rub plenty of shoulder with the *gauche caviar* in the Union. *Someone* must know something."\n
Zh: “那就帮他啊，你这个懦夫。”他的眼里饱含责备的意味。“你不是和工会那些*伪左翼分子*接触挺多的吗。有人*肯定*知道些什么吧。”

En: Then help him, you wimp. Reproach fills his eyes. "You rub plenty of shoulder with the *gauche caviar* in the Union. Someone *must* know something."
Zh: “那就帮他啊，你这个懦夫。”他的眼里饱含责备的意味。“你不是和工会那些*伪左翼分子*接触挺多的吗。有人*肯定*知道些什么吧。”

En: I wish I could, but I just don't know anything. His cheeks turn red. "I always keep my nose clean and don't gossip. Everyone knows and respects that."
Zh: “我也希望我可以，但我真不知道。”他的脸涨得通红。“我总是不惹麻烦，也不爱说长道短。大家都知道，而且也很尊重这一点。”

En: (Squint.) "Are you *denying* me access to information... again?"
Zh: （眯起眼睛。）“你这是在*拒绝*向我透露信息吗……又来一遍？”

En: Sounds a bit like you're holding back.
Zh: “在我听起来，你是有所保留。”

En: Of course he's holding back. The carabineer crosses his arms. "His mouth is so full of Union prick he can't even speak properly."
Zh: “他当然有所保留了。”老兵抱起双臂。“他光顾着跪舔工会，连话都说不清楚了。”

En: Can I at least finish my fucking sentence before you piss on it? Is that okay, René? His eyes are furious. "I'm not anyone important in the Union. I just know Evrart."
Zh: “你他妈能先让我把话说完再这么阴阳怪气的吗？可以吗，雷内？”他怒火中烧。“我在工会里根本不算什么重要角色。我只是认识艾弗拉特而已。”

En: What do you mean, officer? He looks startled.
Zh: “你是什么意思，警官？”他看起来很惊恐。

En: Oh, he knows what you mean. Keeping it to yourself now, may yield some leverage if you ever need it.
Zh: 哦，他知道你是什么意思。现在先不要说出来，等到有需要的时候，也许能产生一定的影响力。

En: Nothing... just a lowly law-man rambling to himself. (Tap on the side of your nose.) "Watch that back."
Zh: “没什么……只是一个卑贱的执法人员在自言自语。”（拍拍你的的鼻子侧面。）“注意你的背。”

En: I don't like where this is going, officer. Don't you think we should do something else now?
Zh: “我不喜欢现在这种趋势，警官。你不觉得我们现在应该做点别的事吗？”

En: No. I want to talk to him. I promise it won't be about pétanque.
Zh: “不。我想跟他聊聊。我保证跟地掷球无关。”

En: Sure. We got a case to solve! [Leave.]
Zh: “当然。我们还有个案子要破呢！”[离开。]

En: He's faking.
Zh: 他在伪装。

En: He got the message.
Zh: 他收到信息了。

En: This guy can act. Not sure I would have caught it if we hadn't *seen* him cheating.
Zh: 这家伙可真能演的。如果没有亲眼*看见*他作弊的话，吾辈都不确定能不能抓到他。

En: *Pardon*, René, he quickly turns back to you. "We must pick this up later, I'm helping the officer right now."
Zh: “*你再说一遍*，雷内，”他飞快地转向你。“我们稍后再继续，现在我要先帮助这位警官。”

En: I know what I saw, cheater.
Zh: “我知道自己看见什么了，骗子。”

En: Actually...
Zh: “事实上……”

En: The hangovers must be getting worse too... Don't think I used to lose my memory every time I had a little drink...
Zh: “宿醉肯定也变糟糕了……我不觉得以前每喝一点小酒就会失忆……”

En: But *not* with a monetary pension unfortunately, the checkered suit snaps at his partner and turns to you. "What can I do for you, officer?"
Zh: “不幸的是，他并*没有*养老金，”穿方格西服的人朝同伴打了个响指，然后转向你。“我能帮你什么吗，警官？”

En: But do I really and *why*?
Zh: 真的是这样吗，而且，*为什么*？

En: Yes, yes, you do. Knowledge is power, bathe in it, empower yourself, trust me.
Zh: 是的，是的，就是这样。知识就是力量，沐浴在知识的海洋里，赋予自己力量，相信我。

En: All that blunt data must have triggered an information hoarding reflex of sorts. Think of it like a small seizure. It will pass.
Zh: 所有那些生硬的数据肯定触发了某种信息储存反射。把这想象成是一次小小的癫痫发作。它会过去的。

En: Can you believe this clown?! This is information you MUST have and he's stalling. Lives *could* be on the line and he's just running out the clock?!
Zh: 这个小丑的话能信？！这是必须掌握的信息，而且他这是在拖延时间。生命*可能*正危在旦夕，而他这是想把时间耗尽吗？！

En: Stop stalling and talk, goddamnit! Is that all?! Cause I swear to god, if you're holding back...
Zh: “别再拖延时间了，快说，该死！就这些吗？！因为我可以向天发誓，如果你有所保留……”

En: This is getting weird, better hit the brakes.
Zh: “这样好像越来越古怪了，还是赶紧踩刹車吧。”

En: ... aaaaaand that's how you break a man if the good cop and the bad cop have left for the day. Disturbing Cop to the rescue!
Zh: ……而且，如果好警察和坏警察今天都不在的话，就只能这么打败一个人。烦人警探前来救驾！

En: *So* weird... what was that, officer? The old man is visibly shaken, but tries to force a smile. "Actually, *please*, let's talk about something else."
Zh: “*太*古怪了……这是在干什么，警官？”老人明显有些动摇，不过还是努力挤出了一个微笑。“其实吧，*拜托*了，我们聊点别的吧。”

En: You were a rat when we were boys and you are a rat now. Of course I knew! He spits. "Your deception was so bad at first I thought you were play-acting for my amusement."
Zh: “我们还是小孩的时候，你就是只老鼠，现在还是。我最清楚不过了！”他吐了一口唾沫。“你的骗术实在是太拙劣，一开始我还以为你是在演戏，想供我消遣呢。”

En: Six months go by and I realize you must think I've gone blind from all the shrapnel in my head. Because only a blind man wouldn't see through that.
Zh: “6个月过去了，我意识到你肯定以为我脑子里那些弹片把我变成了一个瞎子。因为只有瞎子才看不透。”

En: He's known Gaston all his life. Probably knows his every move better than himself. Of course he saw right through the deceit.
Zh: 他认识加斯顿已经一辈子了。对他的一举一动的了解，可能比自己还多。他当然能看穿这种欺骗手段。

En: That guy is a fraud.
Zh: 那家伙就是个骗子。

En: If you wanna expose him, get straight to the point. If you start japing about old age, it's *never* gonna happen.
Zh: 如果你想揭发他，那就直奔主题。如果拿年纪大来开玩笑，那就*永远*也不会发生了。

En: Let's cool Mr. Fight-Or-Flight down, before he kills someone. He gets overstimulated. But seriously, enough with the pétanque already.
Zh: 我们让非战即逃先生先冷静下来，免得他失手杀人。他被刺激过度了。不过说真的，地掷球的事就到此为止吧。

En: Oh, he must have already figured out Gaston's cheating.
Zh: 哦，他肯定早就知道加斯顿在作弊了。

En: Yeah, how did you know?
Zh: “是啊，你是怎么知道的？”

En: I know a *Weird Cop* when I see one. The lieutenant adjusts his glasses. "It doesn't work. *Weird Cop* only confuses the suspect and the *Weird Cop* himself, while all he should have done was ask normal questions."
Zh: “我一眼就能认出‘古怪警探’。”警督调了调眼镜。“这样没用的。*古怪警探*只会让嫌疑人和他自己感到困惑，然而他要做的，不过是问些普通的问题罢了。”

En: Just please ask them normal questions.
Zh: 请直接问他们一些普通的问题。

En: That hurt. The man knows where to sting.
Zh: 好痛。这家伙很懂怎么戳人痛处。

En: I don't understand, René... He looks around with an expression of complete bafflement.
Zh: “我不明白，雷内……”他茫然地四下看了看。

En: Yes, officer, yes!!! I swear, I don't know anything else about pétanque! It's all I know, I swear!
Zh: “是的，警官，我明白！！！我发誓，地掷球的事我就知道这么多！我发誓，别的我都不知道了！”

En: I think I get it. Thanks, Gaston!
Zh: “我想我明白了。谢谢你，加斯顿！”

En: Yes, pétanque. The goal is to throw the *boule*... He holds out the orb. "... as close to the *cochonnet* as you can."
Zh: “是的，地掷球。目标是扔出*大球*……”他拿出一个球体。“……让它尽可能地接近*小球*。”

En: Oh? The goal is to throw your *boule*... He holds out the orb. "... as close to the *cochonnet* as you can."
Zh: “哦？目标是扔出你的*大球*……”他拿出一个球体。“……让它尽可能地接近*小球*。”

En: Interesting. Tell me more about it.
Zh: “有意思。再多跟我说说。”

En: Good, good, Gaston... see, how it's all *good* now?
Zh: “很好，很好，加斯顿……你看，现在一切都*好*了吧？”

En: I think that's all I need to know about pétanque.
Zh: “我想地掷球的事我已经了解的差不多了。”

En: Well... first you draw a circle about a half a metre in diameter. We made ours out of rope, he explains. "Then the order of play is determined by a coin toss. You win it -- you get to throw the *cochonnet*."
Zh: “好吧……首先，你要画一个直径大约半米的圆圈。我们是用绳子画的，”他解释到。“然后抛硬币决定游戏顺序。你赢了的话——你就可以扔*小球*。”

En: Is there *anything* else you can tell me about pétanque?
Zh: “关于地掷球，还有什么*别的*可以告诉我的吗？”

En: I could, but I'd rather not. He smiles. "I don't want to take up your time with trivial details, officer."
Zh: “我可以说，但我宁愿不要。”他笑了。“我不想用这种琐碎的小事占用你的时间，警官。”

En: Is he *denying* you information, when you clearly requested it?! That's it. We're blowing the lid off this man-jar! You *need* to know... things!
Zh: 当你明确要求他提供信息的时候，他这是在*拒绝*吗？！那就这样。我们要把这个人形罐子的盖子打开！你*需要*了解……事情！

En: Trivial? Ha. Ahaha. (Grin at the man.) "You can still tell me, you know. Before anything *happens*."
Zh: “小事？哈。哈哈哈。”（对着男人笑笑。）“你知道的，你还是可以告诉我的。在事情*发生*之前。”

En: Uh... Your keen interest is making him uncomfortable. "Then there's measuring the distance between the *boule* and the *cochonnet*. I always measure ours, but usually it's done by the player who threw last."
Zh: “呃……”你浓厚的兴趣让他有些不安。“然后测量*大球*和*小球*之间的距离。一直都是我量的，不过通常是最后一个扔的人量。”

En: Then the players aim to throw their *boules* as close to the *cochonnet* as possible. They must stay in the circle and keep both feet planted.
Zh: “然后，玩家要用他们的*大球*尽可能地瞄准*小球*。他们必须待在圆圈内，而且必须双脚站定。”

En: The opponent has a right to re-measure if he has doubts about the result and... He is trying to think of something else to say, but then -- seeing your beady eyes -- stops.
Zh: “如果对手对结果有异议，他有权重新测量……”他想说点别的什么，不过——看见你亮晶晶的眼睛之后——他停了下来。

En: That's the *cochonnet*. He points to a small wooden ball in the middle of the crater.
Zh: “那是*小球*。”他指向弹坑中央的一个小木球。

En: I saw what you did there, Gaston. How's your back?
Zh: “我看见你在那边做了什么，加斯顿。你的背怎么样了？”

En: Ugh... it's not very good, officer. I'm an old man and sciatica is gnawing on my joints. There's a look of hopelessness in his eyes. "Some days the pain is almost too much..."
Zh: “呃……这可不太好啊，警官。我是个老人，关节被坐骨神经痛折磨着。”他的眼神略显绝望。“有些日子，这些疼痛几乎让人难以忍受……”

En: Getting older does present a whole new set of challenges... (Keep it to yourself.)
Zh: “变老确实会带来一系列新的挑战……”（自己保密。）

En: Cut the crap, bozo! I saw you cheating!
Zh: “废话少说，笨蛋！我看见你作弊了！”

En: What?! The man tries to act surprised.
Zh: “什么？！”男人努力表现出一副惊讶的样子。

En: Who did you think you were fooling with your moaning, Gaston? He doesn't even glance at his partner.
Zh: “你哼哼唧唧地是想骗谁呢，加斯顿？”他连看都没看自己的同伴一眼。

En: Lately my eyes just aren't the same and even getting out of the bed is pretty difficult...
Zh: “最近我的视力已经大不如前，甚至连起床都变得很困难……”

En: Should've built yourself a better body, Mossback. The kind that lasts. (Secretly flex.)
Zh: “你应该锻炼一副更强健的体魄，老家伙。能维持很久的那种。”（秘密地）

En: I know what you mean, officer, he says excitedly. "Then there's the blood sugar and don't even get me started on the bladder troubles..."
Zh: “我知道你是什么意思，警官，”他兴奋地说道。“还有血糖，甚至让我的膀胱都出问题了……”

En: Why don't the two of you get a tomb and take your whining there. He looks at you, disgusted. "I am ashamed to even stand in the same crater with you."
Zh: “为什么你们俩不挖个坟墓，然后去那里发牢骚呢。”他厌恶地看着你。“跟你站在同一个弹坑里都让我感觉到羞愧。”

En: Goddamn right, son! The old soldier nods in agreement. "No use complaining about it."
Zh: “该死的没错，孩子！”老兵赞同地点点头。“抱怨是没有用的。”

En: Easy now, René. He snickers. "I *will* join the seniors swimming class later, but right now I don't want to keep the officer waiting -- police business is usually urgent."
Zh: “放松点，雷内。”他窃笑到。“我等一下*要去*去参加老年人游泳课，不过现在我不想让警官等太久——警察的工作一般都挺紧急的。”

En: Why don't *you* get a tomb yourself!
Zh: “*你*为什么不给自己挖个坟墓呢！”

En: That sounds blissful, but right now I've got some questions for Gaston.
Zh: “听起来真的挺幸福，不过现在我有些问题要问加斯顿。”

En: Already got one, smart ass. He utters through his teeth. "Comes with the rank and my service record."
Zh: “已经有一个了，自以为是的家伙。”他从牙缝里挤出几个字来。“我的军衔和服役记录附带的。”

En: Of course, officer. He waits for you to speak.
Zh: “当然，警官。”他在等你开口。

En: Uh... thanks. Is there something we can help you with, officer? He avoids your gaze.
Zh: “呃……谢谢。我们还能帮你什么吗，警官？”他回避了你的目光。

En: Yes, yes. I'm sorry, officer. The senior is visibly shaking before you.
Zh: “是的，是的。我很抱歉，警官。”你面前的老人明显在颤抖。

En: Good. Gaston finally understands the rules now. An evil smile runs across his lips. "Let's see if it makes him a better *petanquista*."
Zh: “很好。现在加斯顿终于明白规则了。”他的嘴角牵扯出一个邪恶的微笑。“看看这样能不能让他变成一个更好的*地掷球玩家*。”

En: You'll put that knowledge to good use in twenty... I mean fifty years. I'm sure of that officer.
Zh: “你可以好好利用这门知识，在未来的20……我的意思是，50年里都有用。这一点我很肯定，警官。”

En: What was that all about? Some experimental interrogation technique you're honing?
Zh: “这是在干什么？你是在打磨某种实验性的审讯技巧吗？”

En: I was hoarding information and had a seizure. I'm fine now.
Zh: “我当时在储存信息，然后突然发病了。现在没事了。”

En: Honestly, I don't know what it was.
Zh: “说实在的，我也不知道是什么。”

En: We should leave quickly before it happens again. He looks around. "Right now is a good moment."
Zh: “我们应该在它再次发生之前赶紧离开。”他看了看周围。“现在就是个好时机。”

En: I'm relieved to hear that. He peers at you over his glasses. "Are you well enough to move on to something else now?"
Zh: “听到这个让我很宽慰。”他透过眼镜看着你。“现在你状态够好了吧，可以继续去做别的事了吗？”

En: He sighs. "Hurry up then."
Zh: 他叹了口气。“那就快点吧。”

En: Never thought I'd miss that angry prick...
Zh: “从没想过，我居然会想念那个爱发火的老家伙……”

En: Maybe fishing... or crossword puzzles?
Zh: “也许钓鱼……或者填字游戏？”

En: I wonder if Leo knows pétanque...
Zh: “不知道利奥懂不懂地掷球……”

En: Have the days always been this long?
Zh: “日子总是这么长的吗？”

En: I should be hungry -- why am I not hungry?
Zh: “我应该饿了——为什么我不饿呢？”

En: Say one of these fascist or communist things or fuck off.
Zh: 法西斯主义或是康米主义，随便挑一个说，不然就滚蛋。

En: I'm not gonna beg... anymore.
Zh: 我不会求人的……再也不会了。

En: I'm not gonna beg.
Zh: 我不会求人的。

En: It's probably for the best. People don't like beggars.
Zh: 这样可能最好。大家都不喜欢乞丐。

En: Whoa... easy there, Gold Mouth. He doesn't *have* to say anything. Re-engage cop-mode and bail out, if you like.
Zh: 哇哦……放松点，大金牙。他什么也*不必说*。如果你愿意的话，重新启动警察模式，然后退出吧。

En: Back to police-mode. (Smile and nod.) "I have some questions, Gaston."
Zh: “回归警察模式。”（笑着点点头。）“我有些问题，加斯顿。”

En: No. You're gonna starve to death.
Zh: 没有。你会饿死的。

En: You're not. Everything is fine.
Zh: 你不会的。一切都很好。

En: Alright. The jolly man smiles. "Let's hear them, officer."
Zh: “好吧。”快乐的男人笑了。“说来听听，警官。”

En: What? The lieutenant gives you a sharp glance. "What *oppressors*?"
Zh: “什么？”警督狠狠地瞥了你一眼。“什么*压迫者*？”

En: I don't either, but wouldn't you rather eat a sandwich free of the *bourgeois* guilt-baggage?
Zh: “我也不明白，但是，你难道不想吃掉一个没有*资产阶级*负罪感的三明治吗？”

En: He's not imagining it.
Zh: 他没在想象。

En: Melting butter, yellow like the sun shining on the backs of workers on the fields...
Zh: “融化的黄油，像金灿灿的太阳照耀在田间劳作的工人背上……”

En: Now turn it upside down, black bread -- like a symbol -- on top, to salute the coal mines our heroes worked.
Zh: “现在把它翻转过来，黑色的面包——就像一个符号——放在顶端，向英雄人民工作的煤矿致敬。”

En: I don't eat worker-food! he blurts out, immediately regretting it. "Look, officer, I like different, *classic* food. Fine dining, not *worker backs*. Please, just drop it."
Zh: “我不吃工人食品！”他脱口而出，不过立即就后悔了。“你看，警官，我喜欢与众不同的、*经典*的食物。精致的餐食，而不是*工人的后背*。拜托，别再说了。”

En: The sandwich owner looks at you, eyes filled with anguish. "You're describing prison food, officer. I like different, *better* food. Fine dining, not *jailtime*. Please, just drop it."
Zh: 三明治的主人看着你，眼里写满痛苦。“你描述的是牢饭，警官。我喜欢与众不同的、*更好*的食物。精致的餐食，而不是*监狱时光*。拜托，别再说了。”

En: No, everything would fall off, he argues, glancing at you worriedly. "Look, officer, I'm not a miner. I like different, *tasty* food. Fine dining, not coal. Please, just drop it."
Zh: “不，所有东西都会掉下去的，”他忧心忡忡地瞥了你一眼，争辩到。“你看，警官，我不是矿工。我喜欢与众不同的、*美味*的食物。精致的餐食，而不是煤炭。拜托，别再说了。”

En: What the hell are you talking about? What *foreign anarchist*? the lieutenant asks, confused.
Zh: “你到底在说什么鬼话？什么*外国无政府主义者*？”警督困惑地问到。

En: No time to bring him in. Just keep your eyes on the prize and ignore him.
Zh: 没工夫把他也扯进来。只要心无旁骛地盯准目标，无视他就好。

En: Cause that's how foreigners *are*, Gaston. They won't stop 'till you have nothing left.
Zh: “因为外国人*就是这样*，加斯顿。除非你一无所有，不然他们是不会停下来的。”

En: Good, René's on board too -- time to take back the streets. Right-wing populism, here we come!
Zh: 很好，雷内也准备好了——是时候重新夺回街道。右翼民粹主义，我们来了！

En: Revachol is calling -- she needs us. Not tomorrow, not *soon*, but right now. Let's take our home back.
Zh: “瑞瓦肖在召唤——她需要我们。不是明天，不是*很快*，而是现在。让我们把家园夺回来。”

En: Whatever you're selling there -- he's buying it. In bulk.
Zh: 不管你在兜售些什么——他都会买账的。而且是大批量。

En: I'm actually already a member in a group tasked to keep the streets safe, the lieutenant marks. "You are too. We call ourselves *The Police*."
Zh: “我其实已经隶属于一个维持街道安全的组织了，”警督评论到。“你也是。我们称自己为*警察*。”

En: On second thought... I don't wanna organize a vigilante group after all. (Drop it.)
Zh: “又仔细一想……我根本不想组织什么民兵团。”（放弃。）

En: So... The sandwich-owner looks at you, obviously confused. "Is there something I can help you with instead or...?"
Zh: “所以……”三明治的主人看着你，显然很困惑。“我可以帮你点别的什么忙吗，还是……？”

En: Goddamnit, son... He pushes back his cap. "Once you realize Martinaise -- all of Revachol -- is *actually* going to shit, it will be too late."
Zh: “该死，孩子……”他把帽子往后推了推。“当你意识到马丁内斯——整个瑞瓦肖——*其实*正在走向毁灭时，就已经太晚了。”

En: Kim, I got this. (Wink at him.)
Zh: “金，我可以的。”（朝他眨眨眼。）

En: Are you sure? The lieutenant raises his eyebrows. "Cause right now it looks like you're organizing a vigilante group."
Zh: “你确定吗？”

En: Guillaume's Millions?
Zh: “纪尧姆百万大军？”

En: Suzerain Solution?
Zh: “宗主国答案？”

En: The Three Boiadeiros?
Zh: “三牛仔？”

En: The Migrant Bashers?
Zh: “移民打手？”

En: Frissel Firing Squad?
Zh: “弗里塞尔行刑队？”

En: It's weird. I don't like it. We'll go with mine for now and you... He points to Gaston. "Get excited."
Zh: “太怪了。我不喜欢。暂时先用我的，还有你……”他指向加斯顿。“兴奋一点。”

En: Alright, alright, the old man is taken aback by René's commanding tone, but dares not dispute him. "I have a bad feeling about this."
Zh: “好吧，好吧，”老人被雷内命令的口吻吓了一跳，但也不敢跟他争辩。“我有种很不好的感觉。”

En: His tone leaves no room for arguments. Giving orders is a second skin to the old carabineer.
Zh: 他的口吻没有留下任何争辩的余地。发号施令对于这个老兵来说毫不费力。

En: It's dignified. I like it. We need dignity. And you... He points to Gaston. "Get excited."
Zh: “很高贵。我喜欢这个。我们需要高贵。还有你……”他指向加斯顿。“兴奋一点。”

En: Good good, now that this is done -- GIVE ME THE SANDWICH!
Zh: “好好好，既然这个已经搞定了——把三明治给我！”

En: Just one small thing -- your sandwich. I wanna hold it for a moment.
Zh: “还有一件小事——你的三明治。我想拿一会儿。”

En: It's okay, Gaston, just *please* give me the sandwich now.
Zh: “没事的，加斯顿，现在*请*把三明治给我。”

En: Oh... His eyes light up in understanding. "You went through all that trouble for my sandwich? I'm flattered, officer, but my answer is no. Now how else can I help you?"
Zh: “哦……”想明白的他，眼睛突然亮了起来。“你是为了我的三明治才费这么大劲？我感到受宠若惊，警官，不过我的答案是不行。还有什么别的能帮你的吗？”

En: Actually, let's honour your old unit -- *Épées de la Couronne* it is!
Zh: “其实，还是让我们向你的老部队致敬吧——就叫*王冠之剑*！”

En: Nothing. Actually, let's talk about something else.
Zh: “没什么。其实，我们还是聊点别的吧。”

En: I'm listening, officer. He nods.
Zh: “我正在听，警官。”他点点头。

En: I'm not so sure about this...
Zh: 我不是很确定……

En: Too late. Daddy's already fighting the bad fight. Make it stick.
Zh: 太迟了。老爹已经没什么原则了。记住这一点。

En: Ignore him. You are addressing the entire group now.
Zh: 无视他。现在你是在跟整个团队说话。

En: Oh my god, stop this scheming and just demand the sandwich!
Zh: 天啦，别再耍什么心计了，直接找他要三明治！

En: Stop it! I *just* want the sandwich. Give it to me!
Zh: “打住！我*只想*要三明治。把它给我！”

En: Goddamnit... the old carabineer looks at you, disgusted. "I thought I had you measured, but you can't really measure a slug, can you?"
Zh: “该死……”老兵厌恶地看着你。“我以为自己很了解你了，不过谁能真正了解一个懒汉呢，不是吗？”

En: Oh... His eyes light up in understanding. "All that for a sandwich? I'm flattered, officer, but you can't have it. It's mine."
Zh: “哦……”想明白的他，眼睛突然亮了起来。“你就是为了我的三明治费了这么大劲？我感到受宠若惊，警官，不过不能给你。它是我的。”

En: Not speaking from experience, but yes, you can. It's a common practice among the slug-enthusiasts.
Zh: 不是经验之谈，而是你真的可以。在狂热的懒汉中间，这是一种习惯做法。

En: Manipulating his patriotic impulses like that? René is gonna remember that.
Zh: 那样操纵他的爱国冲动？雷内会记在心里的。

En: This calls for an engineering angle. Structural rigidity, exposed rafters, lattice-works -- that type of approach.
Zh: 这就要求工程学的角度。结构刚性，外露房椽，网格结构——那一类的方法。

En: Lattice-works? Like *Lettuce-works*? I see what you did there. Don't ever do that again.
Zh: 网格结构？就像*生菜工厂*那种吗？我知道你做了什么。再也不要这样做了。

En: Beautiful, now bring it home with paprika.
Zh: 漂亮，现在用红辣椒作为完美收尾。

En: No problem, you just need *his* for research and development first. Just as a prototype of course. Stall now and the sandwich is forever lost.
Zh: 没问题，首先你需要*这个*来做研究和开发。当然了，只是一个原型。现在拖延时间的话，就会永远失去这个三明治了。

En: Initial development takes time of course, but in six to nine months you *will* eat 'The Sandwich of Gods'.
Zh: “初步研发当然是需要时间的，不过6-9个月之后，你*将会*品尝到‘神之三明治’。”

En: Or god of sandwiches maybe? he tries to pitch in. "But in the meanwhile, what can I do for you *here* and *now* officer?"
Zh: “或者是三明治之神？”他试着出一份力。“但是同时，*现在*我能在*这里*为你做些什么呢，警官？”

En: I... I win...?
Ee... okay, sure sure, he quiets you. "Everybody wins, but is there anything I can help you with right now to *speed up* the process?"
Zh: “呃……好吧，当然了，”他让你安静下来。“大家都赢了，不过现在我能不能为你做点什么，来*加速*进程呢？”

En: He looks worried.
Zh: 他看起来很担心。

En: Is there anything I can do for you right now? he asks. "Maybe to speed the whole process up a bit?"
Zh: “现在我还能为你做点别的什么吗？”他问到。“也许可以稍微加快一下整体进程？”

En: He knows exactly what's going on.
Zh: 他完全知道到底发生了什么。

En: Just give me the damn sandwich, so I don't have to explain.
Zh: “赶紧把那个该死的三明治给我，这样我就不用解释了。”

En: Point to the sandwich in silence.
Zh: 默默地指向三明治。

En: I understand the situation, he says quietly and hands you the sandwich. "Please... just take it slowly. Give her the attention she deserves."
Zh: “我明白现在的情况了，”他一边说，一边把三明治递给你。“拜托……动作慢一点。给予它应有的关照。”

En: He nods, understanding the finality of the situation, and hands you the sandwich. "Please... just take it slowly. Give her the attention she deserves."
Zh: 明白事情的最终结果之后，他点点头，把三明治递给了你。“拜托……动作慢一点。给予它应有的关照。”

En: The old man nods and turns away from you.
Zh: 老人点点头，转身离开了你。

En: And now we both walk away and everybody lives.
Zh: 现在我们都会走开，每个人都会活下来。

En: How is your back, Gaston? (Tap on the side of your nose and point to the sandwich.)  "Is it... *jerky*?"
Zh: “你的背怎么样了，加斯顿？”（拍拍你的鼻子侧边，指向三明治。）“它……*抽筋*了吗？”

En: A man so principled about his sandwich calls for a principled approach. Time to get political.
Zh: 一个对三明治如此有原则的人，自然需要有原则的方法。是时候聊点政治了。

En: I admire your handiwork,*chéf*, but there are a few things I'd do differently.
Zh: “我很钦佩你的手艺，*大厨*，不过有些地方我会做出不同的选择。”

En: Well yes, I mean... uh... no need to... He raises his arms to signal you to stop. "I'm not sure I understand what's happening here, officer."
Zh: “呃，是的，我是说……呃……不需要……”他抬起胳膊，向你发出停止的信号。“我不太明白现在的状况，警官。”

En: I got a keen eye and it's telling me this sandwich is gonna destroy your back.
Zh: “我有一双敏锐的眼睛，它告诉我这个三明治会毁了你的背。”

En: Oh... he looks down for the longest time. "You're right of course, officer. It can't be good for my health. Please, take it off my hands."
Zh: “哦……”他低头看了很长时间。“当然，你说的没错，警官。这样对我的健康没有好处。请吧，把它从我手上拿走。”

En: Like what, officer? His eyes rest on the sandwich. "This is as good as they come in Revachol, I assure you."
Zh: “比如什么，警官？”他的目光落在了三明治上。“我可以向你保证，这是瑞瓦肖最好的了。”

En: The bread you built this wonder on, could have been toasted beforehand.
Zh: “作为这个奇迹基础的面包，可以先烤制一下。”

En: That *would* certainly have been an improvement.
Zh: “那样肯定*会是*一种进步。”

En: Had you put a large slice of Olduvaian cheese crosswise from the ham, it would minimize the component loss via crumbling.
Zh: “如果你把火腿和一片奥杜瓦芝士交叉叠放的话，就能通过碎片化来最小化成分损耗。”

En: *Mon dieu*, that is an excellent idea! he exclaims. "That would virtually negate the component loss."
Zh: “*我的天啦*，这个主意真是太棒了！”他大喊到。“这样其实就抵消了成分损耗。”

En: I'll do you one better -- the air pocket between cheese and ham could house pre-roasted paprika.
Zh: “我会来点更好的——在芝士和火腿中间铺上一层预先烤制的红辣椒。”

En: An array of delicious recipes flashes through your mind. Salads... Salmon... Sandwiches. Bingo!
Zh: 一堆美味的食谱从你的脑海中闪过。沙拉……三文鱼……三明治。有了！

En: *Ce serait délicieux*! he shouts excitedly. Can you make that sandwich, officer?"
Zh: “*肯定很美味*！”他兴奋地叫了起来。“你能把那个三明治做出来吗，警官？”

En: All right, this is how we're gonna do it. Diplomacy or blackmail. Blackmail is quick and efficient. Leaves less loose ends.\n
Zh: 好吧，我们这么做。外交或者勒索。勒索快速而高效。留下的悬念也比较少。

En: All right, this is how we're gonna do it:
Zh: 好吧，我们这么做：

En: Ee... okay, sure sure, I'm not worried. We're here all the time. Every day. Impossible to miss us, officer.
Zh: “呃……好吧，当然，我不担心。我们一直都在这里。每天都在。不可能找不到我们的，警官。”

En: Don't worry, about it. (Give him a wink.)
Zh: “不用，担心它。”（朝他眨眨眼。）

En: I hope you are not just tricking an old man out of the little he has left. He says solemnly and hands you his sandwich.
Zh: “我希望你不是只为了从一个老人那里骗走他仅剩的一点东西。”他郑重其事地说道，然后把三明治递给了你。

En: Wait... But I thought... The old-timer, visibly disappointed, pockets the sandwich and sighs. "I'd really like to get back to the game now, if there isn't anything else?"
Zh: “等等……但我以为……”老人显然很失望，他把三明治装进口袋，然后叹了口气。“如果没别的事，我想继续回去玩游戏了？”

En: No. No one can. (Gaze at the distance, slowly shaking your head.)
Zh: “不。没人可以。”（凝视远方，慢慢摇摇头。）

En: Sure, but I'm going to need yours as a *prototype* first.
Zh: “当然，不过首先，我需要你的*原型*。”

En: Envision bread as black as the soil it came from...
Zh: “想象面包跟它来源的土壤一样黝黑……”

En: No, that's too old school. How about...?
Zh: “不，那样太老派了。不如……”

En: What is *political*?
Zh: *政治*是什么？

En: I'm already tripping knee-deep in politics, baby.
Zh: 我已经陷入齐膝深的政治泥潭了，宝贝。

En: *This* right here is political...
Zh: *这个*就叫政治……

En: Your blood-sandwich (point to it) "is a tool of the oppressors, designed to keep the proletariat docile."
Zh: “你那个该死的三明治，”（指着它。）“是压迫者的一种工具，旨在让无产阶级保持顺从的态度。”

En: This city's going to shit. Sooner or later some foreign anarchist is gonna *steal* your sandwich. That's a fact.
Zh: “这座城市要完蛋了。那么外国无政府主义者迟早会*偷走*你的三明治。这就是事实。”

En: You really do. Now, *unleash the fury*!
Zh: 你真的可以。现在，*释放怒火*吧！

En: I'm not going to listen to this commie-*connerie*, he utters through clenched teeth and turns his back to you.
Zh: “我才不会听这个康米主义者的*蠢话*，”他咬牙切齿的挤出几个字，然后转过身背对着你。

En: Eh... I don't think that's gonna happen. He chuckles. "Why would you even...?"
Zh: “呃……我觉得那不太可能发生。”他咯咯地笑了。“你究竟为什么要……”

En: Oh...? Still, the *over-abundance* this sandwich embodies is inherently evil.
Zh: “哦……”不过，这个三明治体现出的*过度充裕*是一种固有的邪恶。”

En: The Lawbringers?
Zh: “执法者吗？”

En: The Vigil Flame?
Zh: “不眠圣火？”

En: Revachol Curbstompers?
Zh: “瑞瓦肖践踏者？”

En: *Now* you are talking sense, son. His eyes light up. "All four of us, working as a group -- we can make a difference."\n
Zh: “*现在*你倒是说了几句正经话，孩子。”他的眼睛亮了起来。“我们四个人，作为一个团队合作——肯定可以改变这一切。”

En: *Now* you are talking sense, son. His eyes light up. "All three of us, working as a group -- we can make a difference."
Zh: “*现在*你倒是说了几句正经话，孩子。”他的眼睛亮了起来。“我们三个人，作为一个团队合作——肯定可以改变这一切。”

En: Salt is essential -- there can't be too much -- because isn't proletariat the salt of society?
Zh: “盐是必不可少的——不能太多——因为，工人阶级不就像社会的盐分一样吗？”

En: How about what?! Judging by his tone the old carabineer really wanted to honour his old unit.
Zh: “不如什么？！”从老兵的口气推断，他真的很想纪念自己的老部队。

En: It's dignified. We need dignity. And you... He points to Gaston. "Get excited."
Zh: “很高贵。我们需要高贵。还有你……”他指向加斯顿。“兴奋一点。”

En: Yes, officer. He proudly displays his culinary miracle. It is magnificent.
Zh: “是的，警官。”他自豪地展示着自己的烹饪奇迹。它实在是太壮丽了。

En: It's got class. And roots. I like it.
Zh: “它很有品，还有根。我喜欢它。”

En: I'm sure we can come up with something with a bit more *oomph* than that.
Zh: 我肯定我们能想出某些比那个更有*吸引力*的东西来。

En: I don't want to, he argues, glancing at you worriedly. "Look, officer, I like different, *classic* food. Fine dining, not soil. Please, just drop it."
Zh: “我不想，”他担忧地瞥了你一眼，开口争辩到。“你看，警官，我喜欢与众不同的、*经典*的食物。精致的餐食，而不是泥土。拜托，别说了。”

En: Let me ask you, comrade, did *you* make the sandwich yourself?
Zh: “我来问你，同志，这个三明治是*你*亲手做的吗？”

En: Agreed. What about the whole group? He quickly adds: "I propose *Épées de la Couronne* -- Swords of the Crown, in honour of my old unit."
Zh: “同意。那整个团队呢？”他快速补充到：“我提议*王冠之剑*，以此来纪念我的老部队。”

En: I really don't understand how my sandwich could... he starts, but falls silent.
Zh: “我真的不明白，我的三明治怎么就……”他刚一开口，又很快陷入了沉默。

En: Huh? The jolly man is scratching his head in bewilderment. He doesn't understand the situation.
Zh: “哈？”快乐的男人困惑地挠挠头。他没搞清楚眼下的状况。

En: First they take our jobs, then our women and when the sandwich is all you have left -- the anarchists will come for that too.
Zh: “一开始他们夺走了我们的工作，然后是我们的女人，当你只剩下三明治的时候——那些无政府主义者也会把它夺走的。”

En: That sounds *horrible*. A grimace of disgust runs over his jolly face. "You really don't know your way around the kitchen, officer. Food and politics don't mix."
Zh: “听起来真的太*可怕*了。”他那张快乐的脸上掠过一丝厌恶的神情。“你真的不了解烹饪，警官。食物和政治是不能混为一团的。”

En: The scepticism emanating from the merry senior could be sensed all the way to the Semenine Isles.
Zh: 这位快乐的老人表现出的怀疑，连塞美尼群岛的人都能感觉到。

En: But imagine a sandwich covered entirely in fine metal dust from an industrial plant...
Zh: “但是想象一下，一个三明治完全被工厂的金属粉末所覆盖……”

En: But imagine a sandwich absolutely minimal in design. Sleek, efficient, simple.
Zh: “但是想象一下，一个设计极为精简的三明治。整洁，高效，简单。”

En: Look, comrade, the *over-abundance* this sandwich embodies is inherently evil.
Zh: “你看，同志，这个三明治体现出的*过度充裕*是一种固有的邪恶。”

En: He won't care. The old veteran glances at his partner. "As long as there's food in his fat belly, he'll lick any boot that's kicking it to him..."
Zh: “他不会在乎的。”老兵瞥了一眼他的同伴。“只要他那个大肚子里面装了食物，他愿意跪舔任何把食物踢到他面前的靴子……”

En: We'll be unit one, *Ghost Dogs*. You and Gaston are unit two -- *The Royal Hounds*.
Zh: “我们是1号部队，*幽灵犬*。你和加斯顿是2号——*皇家猎犬*。”

En: I'll be unit one, *Ghost Dog*. You and Gaston are unit two -- *The Royal Hounds*.
Zh: “我是1号部队，*幽灵犬*。你和加斯顿是2号——*皇家猎犬*。”

En: Guillaume's Lions?
Zh: “纪尧姆的雄狮？”

En: Tell this lost comrade what the People's Sandwich would be like. Distil the essence of the Working Man... in a sandwich.
Zh: 告诉这位迷失的同伴，人民的三明治是什么样的。提炼出工人阶级的本质与精华……寄托在一个三明治里。

En: The Filippian Four?
Zh: “菲利普四世？”

En: I would rather just have this one, officer. He's avoiding your eyes. "It's really good."
Zh: “我宁愿只要这一个，警官。”他避开了你的目光。“它真的很棒。”

En: Men, let's review and, possibly, *redistribute* our resources. (Continue.)
Zh: “老兄，我们再检查一遍，如果可能的话，*重新分配*一下我们的资源。”（继续。）

En: What do you mean, officer? There's a look of suspicion is his eyes.
Zh: “你是什么意思，警官？”他的眼睛里满是怀疑。

En: Wouldn't you rather have a proper sandwich? A sandwich with a soul?
Zh: “难道你不想要个更恰当的三明治吗？一个有灵魂的三明治？”

En: Don't you guys get it? Us, local boys, gotta stick together. Make the people feel safe again.
Zh: “你们还没明白吗？我们，本地人，应该团结在一起。让大家再次感觉到安全。”

En: Sorry, but at this point, all that's left to do is beg and hope for the best. Beg like you've never begged before.
Zh: 抱歉，不过此时此刻，唯一能做的只有祈求并期待最好的结果。用尽全力去祈求。

En: There really isn't *anything* else I could say?
Zh: 我真没有*别的*可以说的吗？

En: These options seem awfully fascist or communist -- what if I don't wanna say them?
Zh: 这些选项似乎不是极端的法西斯主义，就是极端的康米主义——如果我不想说呢？

En: No, officer. The culinary genius shakes his head with unexpected resolve. "Please let it go, It's making me really uncomfortable."
Zh: “不，警官。”烹饪天才摇摇头，表现出意料之外的坚定。“请放弃吧，这样真的让我感觉很不舒服。”

En: Please, please, just *PLEASE* let me have the sandwich, Gaston!
Zh: “求你了，求你了，*请*把这个三明治给我吧，加斯顿！”

En: This was Cindy the SKULL.
Zh: 这是骷髅头辛迪做的。

En: The return to her side.
Zh: 回到她身边。

En: The return of light.
Zh: 光明的归来。

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: Spoken as the something that will one day return? Or as the someone who's waiting?
Zh: 以谁的口吻？某种总有一天终会归来的东西？或是某个等待的人？

En: Fresh blood. The return to her side.
Zh: 新鲜血液。回到她身边。

En: Does this have anything to do with The Return our Katarzine Alasije is waiting for?
Zh: “这跟卡特琳·艾拉洁等待的归来有什么关系吗？”

En: Does this have anything to do with The Return our Miss Oranje is waiting for?
Zh: “这跟奥兰治小姐等待的归来有什么关系吗？”

En: Does this have anything to do with 'The Return' Klaasje is waiting for?
Zh: “这跟卡拉洁等待的‘归来’有什么关系吗？”

En: Does this have anything to do with The Return Katarzine Alasije is waiting for?
Zh: 这跟卡特琳·艾拉洁等待的归来有什么关系吗？

En: Does this have anything to do with 'The Return' Klaasje is waiting for?
Zh: 这跟卡拉洁等待的‘归来’有什么关系吗？

Actor: ONE DAY I WILL RETURN TO YOUR SIDE
En: The graffito has been painted over the traces of the fight that took place here. It smells of blood and heavy fuel oil.
Zh: 这幅涂鸦就画在战斗发生的地方。闻起来有一股鲜血和重燃油的味道。

En: Looks like Cindy the SKULL finally found the words for her masterpiece.
Zh: “看起来骷髅头辛迪总算是为自己的大作找到合适的台词了。”

En: Looks like Cindy the SKULL finally found the words for her masterpiece.
Zh: 看起来骷髅头辛迪总算是为自己的大作找到合适的台词了。

En: I smell heavy fuel oil.
Zh: “我闻到了重燃油的味道。”

En: I smell heavy fuel oil.
Zh: 我闻到了重燃油的味道。

En: Step back, lieutenant. (Set the graffito on fire with a lit cigarette.)
Zh: “退后，警督。”（用点燃的香烟点着涂鸦。）

En: And blood. Some of it is even yours.
Zh: “还有血。有些甚至是你自己的。”

En: The lieutenant crouches, touching the fuel oil with his finger.
Zh: 警督蹲下身，用手指触摸燃油。

En: Looks like it, yes. This is still fresh. It wasn't here yesterday.
Zh: “看起来是的，没错。还是新鲜的。昨天这里还没有。”

En: Looks like Cindy the SKULL has been here.
Zh: “看来骷髅头辛迪来过这里。”

En: Looks like Cindy the SKULL has been here.
Zh: 看来骷髅头辛迪来过这里。

En: The lieutenant crouches, touching the fuel oil with his finger.
Zh: 警督蹲下身，用手指触摸燃油。

En: Or some other hoodlum. This is still fresh. It wasn't here yesterday.
Zh: “或者是其他小流氓。还是新鲜的。昨天这里还没有。”

En: The Return...
Zh: 归来……

En: Does this have anything to do with The Return our Katarzine Alasije was waiting for?
Zh: “这跟卡特琳·艾拉洁等待的归来有什么关系吗？”

En: Does this have anything to do with The Return our Miss Oranje was waiting for?
Zh: “这跟奥兰治小姐等待的归来有什么关系吗？”

En: Does this have anything to do with 'The Return' Klaasje was waiting for?
Zh: “这跟卡拉洁等待的‘归来’有什么关系吗？”

En: Could be. In Revachol West, someone somewhere is always whispering about Le Retour... He squints his eyes at the writing. "It's an *aerograffito*, meant for Coalition aerostatics in the lower troposphere."
Zh: “有可能。瑞瓦肖西部的某些地方，有人一直在念叨着什么归来……”他眯起眼睛，看着地上的文字。“这是一副*空气涂鸦*，是给对流层下部的联盟静风舰看的。”

En: What if the words are not directed at the people of Martinaise, or even the Coalition aerostatics above the city -- they're meant for something above even those...
Zh: 这些话不是针对马丁内斯人，或者甚至不是城市上空悬浮的联盟静风舰——它们是给在那之上的某些人看的……

En: Heavy fuel oil -- isn't that... flammable?
Zh: 重燃油——这不是……易燃物吗？

En: [Leave.]
Zh: [离开。]

Actor: ONE DAY I WILL RETURN TO YOUR SIDE
En: The fuel oil catches fire immediately, with a low hiss -- a bright orange flash across the surface of the lettering. Rain turns to vapour above the burning message, mingling with the black smoke.
Zh: 伴随着一阵低沉的嘶嘶声，燃油立即烧着了——字母表面闪现出一道明亮的橙色闪光。降落在燃烧字母上的雨滴变成了水蒸气，跟黑色的浓烟混在了一起。

Actor: ONE DAY I WILL RETURN TO YOUR SIDE
En: The fuel oil catches fire immediately, with a low hiss -- a bright orange flash across the surface of the lettering. The falling snow turns to vapour above the burning message, mingling with the black smoke.
Zh: 伴随着一阵低沉的嘶嘶声，燃油立即烧着了——字母表面闪现出一道明亮的橙色闪光。飘落在燃烧字母上的雪花变成了水蒸气，跟黑色的雪花混在了一起。

Actor: ONE DAY I WILL RETURN TO YOUR SIDE
En: The fuel oil catches fire immediately with an ominous hiss -- a bright orange flash across the surface of the letters. Black smoke rises from the burning message.
Zh: 燃油立即烧着了，迸发出不祥的嘶嘶声——字母表面闪现出一道明亮的橙色闪光。黑烟从燃烧的字母上升腾而起。

En: What are you trying to imply, fingers?
Zh: 你想暗示什么，手指？

En: No. Nope. No-no-no, bad idea.
Zh: 不。不可以。不不不，这是个坏主意。

En: Set the graffito on fire with a lit cigarette.
Zh: 用一支点燃的香烟点着涂鸦。

En: You *could* buy some smokes, light up a ciggy and throw it in there... You know, just to see what happens. See if it's flammable. It's better that way. Safer.
Zh: 你*可以*买些香烟，点燃一支，然后扔进去……你知道的，看看会发生什么事。看看它能不能烧着。这样做比较好。更安全一些。

En: Okay. Sorry. Hooh. Close call.
Zh: 好吧。抱歉。呼。真是死里逃生。

En: GOD. I'M ON MY WAY.
Zh: “神啦。我马上就来。”

En: YOU'VE BEEN POLICED, MARTINAISE.
Zh: “有警察罩着你呢，马丁内斯。”

En: The lieutenant has taken a small step back. He looks at your face illuminated by the flames and nods silently. Then the fire falters...
Zh: 警督向后退了一小步。他看着你那张被火焰照亮的脸，默默地点点头。然后，火焰熄灭了……

En: DISCO ELYSIUM.
Zh: “极乐迪斯科。”

Actor: ONE DAY I WILL RETURN TO YOUR SIDE
En: The flames warm your face. Then -- a gust of cold wind, and the fire falters...
Zh: 火焰温暖了你的脸庞。接着——一阵冷风吹来，火焰熄灭了……

En: Time to crack this case. Let's really, really have a close look at that window in Klaasje's room.
Zh: “是时候了结这起案子了。我们真的，真的应该仔细观察一下卡拉洁房间里的窗户。”

En: Let's go to that island.
Zh: “我们去那座小岛吧。”

En: The flames warmed him too. Not at all in a bad way.
Zh: 火焰也温暖着他——以一种完全不坏的方式。

En: IT'S TIME TO GO TO THE ISLAND.
Zh: 是时候上岛了。

En: It's time to crack this case. The next logical move is to go back upstairs, to Klaasje's room. Really inspect that window.
Zh: 是时候了结这起案子了。下一个合乎逻辑的举动就是回到楼上——卡拉洁的房间里。好好检查一下那扇窗户。

En: Say nothing. Stare grimly into the flames.
Zh: 什么也不说。冷漠地凝视着火焰。

Actor: ONE DAY I WILL RETURN TO YOUR SIDE
En: The red-dyed fuel oil glistens. This was painted very recently.
Zh: 染红的燃油闪闪发光。这是最近涂上去的。

Actor: ONE DAY I WILL RETURN TO YOUR SIDE
En: And blood. Some of it may even be yours. Looks like a giant mop was used to turn it into lettering...
Zh: 还有血。有些甚至是你自己的。看起来像是用一只巨大的拖把写下了这些字母……

En: Does this have anything to do with The Return Katarzine Alasije was waiting for?
Zh: 这跟卡特琳·艾拉洁等待的归来有什么关系吗？

En: Does this have anything to do with' The Return' Klaasje was waiting for?
Zh: 这跟卡拉洁等待的‘归来’有什么关系吗？

En: Of what and to whom, you think? Spoken as the something that will one day return? Or as the someone who's waiting?
Zh: 是什么，还有是谁，你觉得呢？以某种总有一天终会归来的东西说的？或是以某个等待的人说的？

Actor: ONE DAY I WILL RETURN TO YOUR SIDE
En: Slowly the flames subside, the fuel burning out. The air still smells of mazut -- and springtime.
Zh: 火焰慢慢平息，燃油烧尽了。空气中弥漫着重油的味道——还有春天的味道。

En: I bet you are... The fiery container hurtles toward the earth with a last wink of light. It shatters to a thousand pieces.
Zh: 我打赌你也是……火热的容器带着最后一丝光亮急速冲向地面。碎成了一千片。

En: ... Fuck me, I forgot the bullets. (Just stand there.)
Zh: “……见鬼，我忘记子弹了。”（就这么站在那里。）

En: A sound strategy. He's the leader.
Zh: 很合理的策略。他是领头人。

En: He doesn't want to. But he must.
Zh: 他不想的。但他必须这么做。

En: Think of an argument!
Zh: 想个论点出来！

En: Know about Downwell.
Zh: 了解深井。

En: Gardener is dying.
Zh: 园丁要死了。

En: Got them arguing.
Zh: 让他们争吵。

En: Talk about hanged man.
Zh: 谈论吊人。

En: Name Ellis Kortenaer.
Zh: 名叫埃利斯·科顿艾尔。

En: He was fostered.
Zh: 他是被寄养的。

En: Had blue eyes.
Zh: 蓝色的眼睛。

En: God, you're so frail. Too frail to think further, time is running out...
Zh: 天啦，你真是太脆弱了。脆弱到无法深入思考，时间不多了……

En: A volcano of burning pain erupts from your left shoulder.
Zh: 你的左肩传来一阵如火山般焦灼的痛楚。

En: Fall into total darkness.
Zh: 陷入完全的黑暗。

En: Brother, you already *were* a ghost. Up there, screaming -- along with all of them. Scaring each other. Haunting each other.
Zh: 兄弟，你已经*是*一个幽灵了。就在那里，尖叫着——跟他们所有人一起。吓唬彼此。缠住彼此。

En: Light the spirit bomb and launch it at him.
Zh: 点燃烈酒炸弹，朝他扔出去。

En: Distracted by jungle story.
Zh: 因为丛林的故事而分心。

En: He's thinking he's a bad leader.
Zh: 他在想自己是个坏头目。

En: Figured out the armour.
Zh: 找到了盔甲。

En: Thinking about drinking.
Zh: 想到了喝酒。

En: Got them arguing.
Zh: 让他们争吵。

En: Got gardener shot.
Zh: 园丁中枪。

En: Discussed dead friend.
Zh: 讨论死去的朋友。

En: Got him talking.
Zh: 让他开口说话。

En: Just stood there?!
Zh: 就站在那里？！

En: He's thinking of leaf compactor.
Zh: 他在想树叶压缩机。

En: Shoot him again.
Zh: 再次朝他开枪。

En: Already missed him once.
Zh: 已经错过一次了。

En: Got him doubting his leadership.
Zh: 让他怀疑自己的领导力。

En: Figured out the armour.
Zh: 找到了盔甲。

En: Thinking about drinking.
Zh: 想到了喝酒。

En: Got them arguing.
Zh: 让他们争吵。

En: Got gardener shot.
Zh: 园丁中枪。

En: Discussed dead friend.
Zh: 讨论死去的朋友。

En: Got him talking.
Zh: 让他开口说话。

En: Distracted by memories.
Zh: 因为回忆而分心。

En: He's thinking of leaf compactor.
Zh: 他在想树叶压缩机。

En: The fight? There is no fight. The fight is over -- it was lost. A thousand years ago. You have laid here forever. Keep falling. Deeper... take the door.
Zh: 战斗？没有战斗。战斗结束了——失败了。在一千年以前。你一直躺在这里。继续坠落。越来越深……走进那扇门。

En: Kim? There is no Kim. There is no fight, it's over -- it *was*...
Zh: 金？没有金。没有什么战斗，已经结束了——*那是*……

En: Eugene, to your right! Don't let him...
Zh: “尤金，你右边！别让他……”

En: The porcelain man raises his rifle and takes aim at you. His hands are steady, and the long barrel of the rifle sways slowly...
Zh: 穿陶瓷盔甲的男人端起步枪瞄准了你。他的动作很稳定，但是步枪的长管在慢慢摇摆……

En: To your right, the killer raises his rifle and takes aim at you. His moves are steady, but the long barrel of the rifle sways slowly...
Zh: 你的右边，杀手端起步枪瞄准了你。他的动作很稳定，但是步枪的长管在慢慢摇摆……

En: That's all it takes. There is no room for hesitation. The lieutenant moves, like a spring unloaded. He grabs the gun from your bloody hand and fires behind him.
Zh: 只需要这样。没有犹豫的空间。警督像个松开的弹簧一样移动着。他从你满是鲜血的手中一把抓过枪，朝身后开火。

En: That's all it takes. There is no room for hesitation. The lieutenant moves, like a spring unloaded. He grabs the gun from your bloody hand and fires behind him.
Zh: 只需要这样。没有犹豫的空间。警督像个松开的弹簧一样移动着。他从你满是鲜血的手中一把抓过枪，朝身后开火。

En: You hear a faint scream -- a woman's. Then the sound disappears, like someone pressed STOP on the tape. The woman is gone. So is Kim. Then the whole world...
Zh: 你听见一声微弱的尖叫——是一个女人。然后声音消失了，就像有人按下了磁带上的停止按钮。女人消失了。金也是。还有整个世界……

En: You hear a roar of pain. A death scream. The sound disappears, like someone pressed STOP on the tape. The hulking figure too is gone. And so is Kim. And the whole world.
Zh: 你听见一声痛苦的咆哮。死亡的尖叫。声音消失了，就像有人按下了磁带上的停止按钮。那个笨重的身影也消失了。金也是。还有整个世界。

En: There is no room for hesitation. The lieutenant turns around and fires, his body falling on yours in the course of the motion...
Zh: 没有犹豫的余地。警督转身开枪，在运动过程中，他的身体倒在了你身上……

En: You hear a faint scream -- a woman's. Then the sound disappears, like someone pressed STOP on the tape. The woman is gone. So is Kim. Then the whole world...
Zh: 你听见一声微弱的尖叫——是一个女人。然后声音消失了，就像有人按下了磁带上的停止按钮。女人消失了。金也是。还有整个世界……

En: There is no room for hesitation. The lieutenant turns around and fires, his body falling on yours in the course of the motion...
Zh: 没有犹豫的余地。警督转身开枪，在运动过程中，他的身体倒在了你身上……

En: You hear a roar of pain. A death scream. The sound disappears, like someone pressed STOP on the tape. The hulking figure too is gone. And so is Kim. And the whole world.
Zh: 你听见一声痛苦的咆哮。死亡的尖叫。声音消失了，就像有人按下了磁带上的停止按钮。那个笨重的身影也消失了。金也是。还有整个世界。

En: Have mercy on yourself. Take the door.
Zh: 可怜可怜你自己。进门吧。

En: Stop, this is the police! (Get between them.)
Zh: “住手，我是警察！”（走到两人中间。）

En: (Whisper.) "Let's walk away for now."
Zh: （低语。）“我们暂时先离开吧。”

En: No, the lieutenant says firmly. "We have to step in. This is not going to end well if we don't..."
Zh: “不，”警督坚定地说道。“我们必须介入。如果我们不插手的话，肯定不会有好结果的……”

En: Get lost, comedian. You cops had your chance. Now it's fucking time for some justice. He licks his lips, waving his gun at the crowd. Losing his balance for a moment, he staggers backward.
Zh: “滚开，小丑。我们给过你们警察机会了。他妈的现在是伸张正义的时候。”他舔舔嘴唇，朝着人群挥舞手枪。他一时失去了平衡，踉踉跄跄地退后了几步。

En: Listen! They didn't do it!
Zh: “听我说！不是他们做的！”

En: You're all drunk, look at yourselves!
Zh: “你们都喝醉了，看看你们自己！”

En: Stand there quietly; hope nothing bad happens.
Zh: 安静地站着；希望不会有坏事发生。

En: Fuck, there's a third one... How did we miss something like this? The lieutenant points to the helmeted figure.
Zh: “该死，还有第三个人……我们怎么会错过这个呢？”警督指着戴头盔的那个人。

En: Shoot Kortenaer.
Zh: 朝科顿艾尔开枪。

En: Distracted by memories.
Zh: 因为回忆而分心。

En: Got him doubting his leadership.
Zh: 让他怀疑自己的领导力。

En: Figured out the armour.
Zh: 找到了盔甲。

En: Thinking about drinking.
Zh: 想到了喝酒。

En: Got them arguing.
Zh: 让他们争吵。

En: Got gardener shot.
Zh: 园丁中枪。

En: Discussed dead friend.
Zh: 讨论死去的朋友。

En: Got him talking.
Zh: 让他开口说话。

En: Just stood there?!
Zh: 就站在那里？！

En: He's thinking of leaf compactor.
Zh: 他在想树叶压缩机。

En: The Wild Pines rep does not approve of this!
Zh: “野松公司的代表不会允许你们这么做的！”

En: With a crash of shattering glass and a terrible roar the fire draws in oxygen -- the bomb hits the mercenary in the chest,  swallowing him in flames as he staggers backward.
Zh: 随着玻璃碎裂的巨响和一声恐怖的咆哮，火焰吸入了氧气——炸弹击中了雇佣兵的胸膛，被火焰吞没的他，踉踉跄跄地向后退去。

En: No. It's off. *Way* off. I told you.
Zh: 不会。偏了。*太偏*了。我告诉过你的。

En: ...*PIGFUCK!* The voice from beneath the helmet interrupts your thoughts. You only make out the last word.
Zh: “……*操你妈*！”头盔下传来的声音打断了你的思绪。你只听到了最后一个词。

En: There is a hole in his cheek. He's not smiling anymore. He stumbles backward, eyes filled with disbelief, gurgling, muttering something unintelligible...
Zh: 他的脸上开了个洞。笑容从他脸上消失了。他踉跄地向后退，眼里充满了愤怒和怀疑，嘴里嘟囔着某些不知所云的东西……

En: There is a hole in his cheek. Blood gushes out as he stumbles backward, eyes filled with rage and disbelief -- gurgling, muttering something unintelligible...
Zh: 他的脸上开了个洞。他踉跄地向后退，鲜血喷涌而出，眼里充满了愤怒和怀疑——嘟囔着某些不知所云的东西……

En: Go ahead. Give it another try. The man doesn't even move. He’s smiling.
Zh: 男人动都没动一下。他笑着说道：“来吧。再试一次。”

En: They teach you to shoot the chest in copland? Stupid fuck... The man shrugs and turns to his left and says: "Kill him."
Zh: “他们在科普兰教你朝胸部开枪吗？愚蠢的混账……”男人耸耸肩，转向左边，说道：“杀了他。”

En: IT'S A *FIASCO*, BRATAN!
Zh: 这真是*大惨败*，兄弟！

En: 'I only ever wanted you to have fun, Harry!' it calls out to you. One last time.
Zh: “我只想让你玩得开心点，哈里！”它呼唤着你。最后一次。

En: The porcelain man raises his rifle and takes aim at you. His hands are steady, and the long barrel of the rifle sways slowly...
Zh: 穿陶瓷盔甲的男人端起步枪瞄准了你。他的动作很稳定，但是步枪的长管在慢慢摇摆……

En: To your right, the killer raises his rifle and takes aim at you. His moves are steady, but the long barrel of the rifle sways slowly...
Zh: 你的右边，杀手端起步枪瞄准了你。他的动作很稳定，但是步枪的长管在慢慢摇摆……

En: Dodge the shot.
Zh: 避开子弹。

En: He'll overcorrect.
Zh: 他会矫枉过正的。

En: You are faster.
Zh: 你更快一些。

En: He'll make a mistake
Zh: 他会犯错的。

En: Help is on the way.
Zh: 支援马上就到。

En: Scared!
Zh: 害怕！

En: You leap left. A swarm of angry lead-hornets passes mere millimetres from your side. Feels like they're almost touching your naked skin.
Zh: 你跳向左边。一大群愤怒的铅制大黄蜂从你的身边仅仅几毫米的地方擦身而过。感觉几乎就要碰触到你裸露的肌肤。

En: You leap left. A swarm of angry lead-hornets passes mere millimetres from your side, tearing fabric off your shirt. Feels like the lightest of tucks.\n
Zh: 你跳向左边。一大群愤怒的铅制大黄蜂从你的身边仅仅几毫米的地方擦身而过，撕裂了你衬衫的布料。感觉就像是最轻的缝摺。

En: You leap left. A swarm of angry lead passes mere millimetres from your side, tearing fabric off your coat. Feels like the lightest of tucks.
Zh: 你跳向左边。一大群愤怒的铅弹从你的身边仅仅几毫米的地方擦身而过，撕裂了你外套的布料。感觉就像是最轻的缝摺。

En: The shot rings and you stumble. Something violently tugs at your shoulder, pushing you backwards with incredible force.
Zh: 枪声响起，你踉跄了一下。有什么东西猛烈地拉扯着你的肩膀，一股难以置信的力量将你推向后方。

En: A plume of smoke and fire erupts from the gun and your hand goes numb from the explosion...
Zh: 一团烟雾和火焰从枪口喷发而出，你的手因为爆炸变得麻木……

En: A small explosion expels the bullet from the chamber. With a puff of smoke it hits the man square in the chest -- producing a soft clicking sound in the armour.
Zh: 一场小爆炸将子弹从枪膛中推出。伴随着一阵烟雾，子弹击中了男人的胸膛——在盔甲上发出了轻微的咔哒声。

En: A low shot rings. You feel a tapping, like rain on your chest plate. Heavy drops of rain. Then the sound of dice rolling, as the cuirass distributes the shot evenly from plate to plate.
Zh: 一阵低沉的枪声响起。你感觉到一下轻拍，就像雨滴降落在你的护胸上。气势磅礴的大雨滴。胸甲将子弹均匀地分散在一片片的护甲上，发出骰子滚动的声音。

En: God, please... the lieutenant says quietly, without trembling. He aims, face pale...
Zh: 警督瞄准目标，面色苍白。他没有颤抖，只是默默地念叨着：“神啊，求你了……”

En: Blood gushes from the helmet's eye-sockets as Ruud staggers back, disoriented. The sounds coming from his helmet are not human.
Zh: 鲜血从头盔男的眼窝里不断涌出，鲁德踉跄地退后几步，迷失了方向。头盔下传出来的声音，不像是人类发出的。

En: Then -- two shots ring at once and you hear a scream, but you're too hurt to see, who got hit.\n
Zh: 然后——两声枪响同时响起，你听见一声尖叫，但是疼痛难耐的你没有看到是谁中枪了。

En: Then -- two shots ring at once. One from the lieutenant's pistol and the other from De Paule's. It's aimed at the lieutenant, but it misses. You hear a scream behind you...
Zh: 然后——两声枪响同时响起。一枪来自曷城警督的手枪，另一枪来自波勒。它瞄准了金，但是没有打中。你听见背后传来一声尖叫……

En: Glen -- dying in a puddle of blood behind you. His mangled torso has two gunshot wounds, blood gushes out of them like red geysers.
Zh: 格伦——倒在你身后的血泊中。他残破的躯干上有两处枪伤，鲜血像红色的喷泉一样喷涌而出。

En: You see two cold eyes looking at you -- through all the smoke and the panic. And a pistol, raised, aiming at your chest, point blank. Then the man squeezes the trigger...
Zh: 你看见两只冰冷的眼睛凝视着你——透过所有烟雾和恐慌。还有一支手枪，慢慢举起，瞄准了你的胸膛，水平瞄准。然后男人扣动扳机……

En: Evade the shot.
Zh: 避开子弹。

En: You simply blink. Then something inside your pelvis explodes. Your entire lower body is on fire and your legs can't support you... you fall down like a rag doll.
Zh: 你只是眨了眨眼。接着，你骨盆里的某种东西爆炸了。你整个下半身都像着火一样，双腿再也无法支撑你的重量……你像个布娃娃一样倒下了。

En: You can't. There is no time. Something inside your pelvis explodes. Your entire lower body is on fire and your legs can't support you... you fall down like a rag doll.
Zh: 做不到。时间不够。你骨盆里的某种东西爆炸了。你整个下半身都像着火一样，双腿再也无法支撑你的重量……你像个布娃娃一样倒下了。

En: The Hardie boys are screaming, fighting, dying. Someone jumps over you -- nearby gunfire shatters glass.
Zh: 哈迪兄弟在尖叫，在战斗，在死去。有人从你身上跳了过去——附近的枪声震碎了玻璃。

En: You're bleeding out! Out of it -- a silhouette appears, crouching over you. You hear a familiar voice filled with urgency and fear.
Zh: 从那中间——出现了一个身影，蹲伏在你身边。一个熟悉的声音响起，充满了焦急和恐惧：“你在流血！”

En: You're bleeding out! Nothing. Darkness, blurring lights of pain. Out of it, a silhouette emerges -- crouching over you. A familiar voice, filled with urgency and fear.
Zh: 什么也没有。黑暗，只有痛苦那模糊的光芒。一个人影从里面出现——蹲伏在你身边。一个熟悉的声音响起，充满了焦急和恐惧：“你在流血！”

En: But you can't. It's so hard. Your eyelids grow heavy and the sounds ever more distant. And a cold comes over you. The lieutenant, too, is somewhere far away. Almost gone... when suddenly! You sense something behind him...
Zh: 但你做不到。太难了。你的眼皮越来越重，声音越来越遥远。一股冰冷的感觉将你包围。警督，也是一样，就在远处的某个地方。几乎消失不见……突然间！你感觉到他身后有什么东西……

En: A slender white shadow, towering. Someone stands there -- raising her pistol at him. The lieutenant does not see it. He's pushing down on your wound with both hands...
Zh: 一个修长的白色阴影，高高耸立着。有人站在那里——朝他举起了手枪。警督没有看见。他的两只手正压在你的伤口上……

En: No!!! Kim...
The lieutenant trusts you.
Zh: 警督相信你。

En: Kim *truly* trusts you.
Zh: 金*真心*相信你。

En: Haven't earned Kim's trust.
Zh: 没有赢得金的信任。

En: Kim *really* doesn't trust you.
Zh: 金*真的*不相信你。

En: No, you scream: "BEHIND YOU!" from your bloody lips. Your eyes are full of fear.
Zh: “不，”你大喊到：“在你背后！”这句话从你血流不止的嘴唇中蹦了出来。你的眼中充满了恐惧。

En: There... behind... You hear your bloody lips mumble, but he does not understand. He does not look into your eyes and see the fear there. He does not trust you.
Zh: “在那里……背后……”你听见自己血流不止的嘴唇在低声嘟囔，但他并不明白。他没有看着你的眼睛，没有看见里面的恐惧。他不相信你。

En: Like a pillow, he falls on you. Cold nylon and blood slumped on you, as the lights go out. All the lights. The last thing you hear is the sound of his spectacles landing on the pavement next to you.
Zh: 他就像一个枕头倒在你身上。冰冷的尼龙和鲜血重重地压在你身上，灯熄灭了。所有灯都熄灭了。你最后听见的，是他的眼镜掉落在你身边人行道上的声音。

En: This is death. One more door, baby. One more door.
Zh: 这就是死亡。还有一扇门，宝贝。还有一扇门。

En: Good, I want to die.
Zh: 很好，我想死。

En: No. Let me back into the fight. Let me save Kim.
Zh: 不。让我继续战斗。我要救金。

En: No. Let me back into the fight.
Zh: 不。让我继续战斗。

En: It's *STILL* not over, he's hurting now. Deep inside, the minuscule matter which you are composed of persists. The ride never ends. It just gets harder.
Zh: *还没有*结束，现在他受伤了。在你内心深处，那些组成你的微小物质依然存在。这次旅程永远不会结束。它只会变得更加艰难。

En: Think you can hang our brother and then just fucking *talk* your way out of it? His eyes flash.
Zh: “你以为可以绞死我们的兄弟，然后他妈的就这么用*嘴炮*逃开吗？”他的眼睛闪闪发光。

En: Throw the gun at him: "Die!"
Zh: 把枪朝他扔过去：“去死吧！”

En: The weapon bounces off his shoulder. He turns to his left and says: "Kill him."
Zh: 武器从他的肩头弹开了。他转向右边，说道：“杀了他。”

En: Look through the smoke rising from the barrel.
Zh: 目光穿透枪管里冒出的黑烟。

En: Look at Kortenaer.
Zh: 看着科顿艾尔。

En: The smoke drifts west with the wind. You hear the plaza erupt in violence, slow, like a waterfall in reverse.
Zh: 黑烟被风吹向西边。你听见广场上爆发了暴力事件，慢慢的，就像瀑布在倒流。

En: His lips -- moving, swollen with fear -- are trying to say: 'Shoot him, shoot him!', but he can't.
Zh: 他的嘴唇——蠕动着，因为恐惧而肿胀——试着说出：‘朝他开枪，朝他开枪！’，但他做不到。

En: Blink -- think!
Zh: 眨眨眼——好好想想！

En: You stare down the barrel of the gun. You see Ruud's mask behind it -- his eye in the slit of the helmet. Like a camera lens focusing on you.
Zh: 你盯着枪管。在它后面，你看见鲁德的面具——头盔缝隙中他的眼睛。就像聚焦在你身上的相机镜头。

En: Is there anything -- *anything* -- we could use to protect this frail body? That gun will tear us to pieces.
Zh: 有什么东西——*任何东西*——可以用来保护这具脆弱的身体？那支枪会把我们撕成碎片的。

En: Kim! Where is Kim?!
Zh: 金！金在哪？

En: From the corner of your eye you see the lieutenant raise his pistol -- and aim it at Ruud.
Zh: 通过眼角的余光，你看见警督举起了手枪——瞄准了鲁德。

En: The pain flows over your entire body like an awful shock. A grim knowing rises from within -- half of your body must be gone.
Zh: 疼痛就像一阵恐怖的电击窜遍你整个身体。一种糟糕的感觉从里面升起——你的半边身体肯定都没了。

En: Joy! I am alive!!!
Zh: 开心！我还活着！！！

En: The man tilts his head, trying to see through the clearing smoke -- for the *next* shot.
Zh: 男人歪着头，试着看透正在消散的烟雾——为了*下一次*射击。

En: OH GOD! WATCH OUT!
Zh: 天啦！小心！

En: Who screamed?
Zh: 谁在尖叫？

En: You see two crazed eyes stare at you -- through the burning meat and the flames. With his face boiling off the man raises his pistol at you. Then he squeezes the trigger...
Zh: 你看见两只癫狂的眼睛死死地盯着你——透过燃烧的肉体和凶猛的烈焰。脸庞已经辨认不清的他朝你举起手枪。然后他扣动了扳机……

En: You see two crazed eyes stare at you -- through all the smoke and the panic. With blood gushing from his face the man raises his pistol at you. Then he squeezes the trigger...
Zh: 你看见两只癫狂的眼睛死死地盯着你——透过所有的烟雾和惊恐。脸庞已经辨认不清的他朝你举起手枪。然后他扣动了扳机……

En: Look the burning man in the eye.
Zh: 看着火人的双眼。

En: Look him in the eye.
Zh: 看着他的眼睛。

En: Here it comes. Death.
Zh: 它来了。死亡。

En: The pain is too immense to scream. It pushes the air out of your lungs. Everything goes dark, a distant blur as you recede into it...
Zh: 巨大的疼痛让你叫不出声来。它把你肺部所有的空气都挤了出去。一切都变黑了，你陷入黑暗，只感觉到一片遥远的模糊……

En: Listen... *through* the darkness and the pain.
Zh: 倾听……*穿过*这片黑暗和痛苦。

En: (Try to open your eyes.) What do I see?
Zh: （试着睁开双眼。）我看见了什么？

En: Touch your lower body...
Zh: 摸摸你的下身……

En: The Hardie boys are yelling. Someone is running, jumping over you. In the background you hear gunfire shatter glass -- and then a man in pain. A familiar sound.
Zh: 哈迪兄弟在尖叫。有人在奔跑，从你身上跳了过去。背景里传来震碎玻璃的枪声——然后是一个痛苦的男人在哀嚎。一个熟悉的声音。

En: It's Titus. With a splat like meat, you hear bullets rip into him. His voice, still giving orders, grows fainter... A gurgle...
Zh: 是提图斯。你听见子弹贯穿他的身体，发出啪哒啪哒的声响。他的声音，还在发号施令，但却越来越微弱……化作一阵咯咯声……

En: Nothing. A persisting darkness. Dancing lights of pain. Distant shadows cast by them, like a hellish play...
Zh: 什么也没有。只有永恒不变的黑暗。舞动的痛苦之光。它们在远方投下的阴影，宛如地狱在上演……

En: No one wants to *do* anything with me... no one wants to party with me.
Zh: “没人想和我一起*做*任何事……没人想跟我一起派对。”

En: Of course... I get gunned down and die. Sorry fuck...
Zh: “当然……我中枪了，即将死去。可怜的混账……”

En: Gunned down in the line of duty... it's okay.
Zh: “在执行任务时被枪杀……没事的。”

En: The wolf is at the door, Kim. He will eat the sun.
Zh: “金，狼就在门口。它会吃掉太阳。”

En: A shadow, towering. Someone stands there -- raising his pistol at him. The lieutenant does not see it. He's pushing down on your wound with both hands...
Zh: 一个阴影，高高耸立着。有人站在那里——朝他举起了手枪。警督没有看见。他的两只手正压在你的伤口上……

En: Just let the darkness take you.
Zh: 让黑暗将你吞噬。

En: It's not all dark yet. As you're leaving, *he* is in there too, with you. You can *feel* the figure move. And then a distant gunshot. Velvety smooth. Muffled.
Zh: 还不是完全的黑暗。当你离开时，*他*也在那里，跟你在一起。你能*感觉*到人影在移动。然后是一声遥远的枪响。如天鹅绒般光滑。听不清。

En: Wait!!! I didn't even know your name!
Zh: 等等！！！我甚至都不知道你的名字！

En: What's wrong with me?
Zh: 我这是怎么了？

En: Good bye, necktie!
Zh: 再见了，领带！

En: Your heart is broken, *bratushka*. And it cannot be mended. Believe me, I've tried.
Zh: 你的心碎了，*兄弟*。无法修补。相信我，我试过了。

En: This guy? Well -- his face has *cracked open* into a scream of terror. It looks like he's performing some sort of a shamanistic dance... that requires you to be on fire?!
Zh: 这个家伙？好吧——他的脸*裂开了*，化成一声恐怖的尖叫。他就像是在表演某种仪式的舞步……而且需要全身被火焰包围？！

En: What's going on with *that* guy?
Zh: *那个*家伙怎么了？

En: What's going to happen now?
Zh: 现在会怎么样？

En: I'm sorry. (Conclude.)
Zh: 我很抱歉。（总结。）

En: *What's going to happen now?* Everyone's going to die, what do you think is going to happen?
Zh: *现在会怎么样*？大家都会死，不然你以为会怎么样？

En: Wait! Uh... what's the story between us?!
Zh: 等等！呃……我们俩之间有什么故事？！

En: You were a sad drunk who bought an ugly tie -- who gives a shit! Everyone is going to die because our plan failed. I have *no idea* how you're gonna get out of this. No idea.
Zh: 你是个凄惨的酒鬼，买了一条丑不拉几的领带——谁他妈在乎！所有人都会死，因为我们的计划失败了。我*不知道*你要怎么避免这一切。完全不知道。

En: What's the matter, loincloth? Got your mouth full of dick? He croaks. "Think I'm gonna spare you?! My brother is dead..."
Zh: “怎么了，野人？满嘴是屎说不出话来了？”他嘶哑地说道。“以为我会放过你吗？！我的兄弟死了……”

En: Shit, this is it. Tell him anything, tell him you have more information!
Zh: 该死，就是这样。跟他说点什么，告诉他你还有更多信息！

En: Kill me and you'll never find out who killed your stepbrother. I've been withholding information.\n
Zh: “杀了我的话，你永远也不会知道是谁杀了你的继兄。有些信息我一直没有说出来。”

En: Kill me and you'll never find out who killed your brother. I've been withholding information.\n
Zh: “杀了我的话，你永远也不会知道是谁杀了你兄弟。有些信息我一直没有说出来。”

En: Kill me and you'll never find out who killed your colonel. I've been withholding information.
Zh: “杀了我的话，你永远也不会知道是谁杀了你的上校。有些信息我一直没有说出来。”

En: Go ahead then. Kill me then. I *want* to die.
Zh: “那就来吧。杀了我。我*想*死。”

En: Me and Kim are gonna fucking murder you!
Zh: “他妈的，我和金要杀了你！”

En: Ruud... The man looks to his left. "Kill him."
Zh: “鲁德……”男人看向右边。“杀了她。”

En: WATCH OUT! To your left, de Paule is about to take a shot too -- at Kim!
Zh: 小心！你左边，波勒也要开枪了——目标是金！

En: What parts of me are... missing?
Zh: 我的哪一部分……不见了？

En: Where is Klaasje? She can explain this.
Zh: “卡拉洁在哪？她可以解释的。”

En: Kim -- did he hit the rifleman?!
Zh: 金——他打中步枪兵了吗？

En: So... it's not going to hit?
Zh: 所以……不会命中吗？

En: Put your damn gun down. Titus remains calm. "People are gonna get hurt. We need to talk this through, alright?"
Zh: “把你的枪放下。”提图斯依然很镇静。“有人会受伤的。我们需要好好谈谈，对吗？”

En: You're all drunk, come to your senses! She sounds very sure of herself. "You won't gun down seven people in the middle of the street. This isn't a frontier town or a jungle outpost."
Zh: “你们都喝醉了，清醒一点！”她的语气很坚决。“你不会在大街中央枪杀7个人的。这里不是什么边陲小镇，也不是丛林哨站。”

En: This is a misunderstanding. Nothing irreversible has happened yet. You can just return to your unit and forget all about this.
Zh: “这里有些误会。还没有发生什么不可逆的事情。你还可以回到你的部队，忘掉这一切。”

En: The kipt is merciful. Willing to spare us if we just forget about our murdered and humiliated commander. Her tone is frighteningly emotionless. "I think we should just kill everyone, Korty."
Zh: “吉皮特可真是宽容大量。只要忘掉我们那位被谋杀和羞辱的指挥官，就会饶我们一命。”她的语气平淡地让人恐惧。“我想我们应该把所有人全杀光，科迪。”

En: *Kipt* is a pejorative term used to describe people of Semenese descent.
Zh: *吉皮特*是一个用来描述塞美尼后裔的贬义词。

En: Easy, Lizzie... His voice is almost gentle. "Let me handle it. I know guys like this. I'm sure we can come to a peaceful agreement. Ain't that right, fellas?"
Zh: “放松点，莉兹……”他的声音非常温柔。“让我来处理这件事。我了解这种人。我相信我们能达成和平协议。对吗，伙计们？”

En: He's dangerous...
Zh: “他很危险……”

En: Kim, what's going on here?
Zh: “金，这里是怎么了？”

En: The lieutenant is genuinely worried for his life. You should consult him before getting in there.
Zh: 警督由衷地为自己的生命安全担忧。在过去之前，你应该找他商量一下。

En: Easy now... No one needs to die here today...
Zh: “放松点……今天没有人必须死在这里……”

En: No one is going to kill anyone. Let's just put the guns down and talk like civilized human beings.
Zh: “没人会杀害任何人的。我们大家把枪放下，像文明人一样谈谈。”

En: With a wordless gurgle, the killer loads his long rifle...
Zh: 伴随着一阵无言的咯咯声，杀手给他的长步枪上了膛……

En: I can see you're drunk.
Zh: “我看得出你喝醉了。”

En: Say nothing, cross your arms.
Zh: 什么也不说，抱起双臂。

En: Oh, people are gonna die today. We're not leaving it like this. These *tribals* hung him up for everyone to see...
Zh: “哦，今天肯定有人会死。我们不会就这么离开的。这帮*野蛮人*把他吊起来给所有人看……”

En: Oh yeah, welcome to the fucking party. He looks around. "You're probably gonna get killed too, I don't give a shit if you're cops."
Zh: “哦耶，欢迎参加这个该死的派对。”他环顾四周。“你可能也会死，我他妈不在乎你是不是警察。”

En: You... Kortenaer turns his bloodshot eyes to you.
Zh: “你……”科顿艾尔用那双嗜血的眼睛看着你。

En: The leader gives a small nod to the helmeted man. Suddenly the blue medicinal spirit in your hand seems to have a pulsating glow. It feels enticing somehow...
Zh: 领头人朝戴头盔的男人微微点点头。突然间，你手中的药用烈酒似乎发出了脉动的光芒。莫名感觉有些诱惑的意味……

En: The leader gives a small nod to the helmeted man. Suddenly the grip of your side-arm feels comforting and warm in your hand. Feels like it's saying: Do it!
Zh: 领头人朝戴头盔的男人微微点点头。突然间，你手中的配枪变得安慰又温暖。它好像在说：动手吧！

En: The leader gives a small nod to the helmeted man. You feel your fists contract, as you stand there, between these men -- all carrying real weapons.
Zh: 领头人朝戴头盔的男人微微点点头。你站在这群人中间，感觉自己的拳头渐渐握紧——他们都拿着货真价实的武器。

En: The leader gives a small nod to the helmeted man. Suddenly your fingers holding the grip of a gun, that has just taken a life, tingle... Go for it, it seems to say.
Zh: 领头人朝戴头盔的男人微微点点头。突然间，你的手指握住了一支枪，那支刚刚夺取一条生命的枪，有些刺痛——它似乎在说，放手去做吧。

En: You really, really should have a gun in your hand by now -- or *something* dangerous. This feels *scary*.
Zh: 你的手里现在真的、真的应该拿把枪——或者是*某种*危险的东西。这样感觉很*吓人*。

En: Shoot him in the mouth. Shoot him before he shoots you.
Zh: 朝他的嘴巴开枪。在他开枪之前，先发制人。

En: 'I feel it in my fingers... I feel it in my toes...'
Zh: ‘我的手指感觉到了……我的脚趾也感觉到了……’

En: Am I going to stay like this forever?
Zh: 我会永远这个样子吗？

En: No. You're going to be mowed down by gunfire from the two remaining mercs, so no. Not forever.
Zh: 不。你会被剩下的两个雇佣兵乱枪打死，所以不行。永远不行。

En: Who broke my heart?
Zh: 谁伤了我的心？

En: You both did, *bratan* -- deep down you know it was the both of you.
Zh: 你们俩都有，*兄弟*——在内心深处，你知道你们俩都有。

En: May he find peace by his brother.
Zh: 愿他能在自己的兄弟那里得到安宁。

En: May he find peace by his stepbrother.
Zh: 愿他能在自己的继兄那里得到安宁。

En: May he find peace in death.
Zh: 愿他能在死亡中找到安宁。

En: He got what was coming for him.
Zh: 这是他自找的。

En: It's good to see you still have capacity for compassion my friend. Deep down you are a good man.
Zh: 很高兴看到你还有同情心，我的朋友。你的内心深处还是个好人。

En: Eventually we all do, Harry.
Zh: 最终我们都会这样，哈里。

En: This is it. I'm gonna hit the ground and burn away now. Most of the people in this yard are gonna die -- if not all. Probably you too. It's a COMPLETE DISASTER.
Zh: 就这样了。现在我会掉落在地面上，烧个精光。这个院子里大部分人都会死——如果不是全部的话。你可能也会死。这会是一场彻头彻尾的灾难。

En: Wow you threw it far -- great throw. Too bad the goal was to throw it a very *short* distance and now everyone will die.
Zh: 哇哦，你扔的真够远的——扔得很漂亮。可惜目标是把它扔的*近一些*，现在大家都会死了。

En: Thanks, coach!
Zh: 谢谢你，教练！

En: Don't thank *me*, you did this!
Zh: 别谢*我*，这是你做的！

En: Uh, what? The lieutenant quickly glances at you.
Zh: “呃，什么？”警督飞快地瞥了你一眼。

En: An Ister AR-FA7, built for taking out light armoured vehicles. It will devastate you.
Zh: 伊斯特AR-FA7，造出来就是为了摧毁轻型装甲車。它会尽情蹂躏你的。

En: He's trying to find a straight line of sight before the rifleman can take you out.
Zh: 他试着在步枪兵干掉你之前找出一条清晰的瞄准线。

En: Absolute destruction.
Zh: 绝对的毁灭。

En: He's drunk. Drunk fighters over-correct. Move right -- he aims further right. Get him to overshoot!
Zh: 他喝醉了。醉酒的战士有些矫枉过正。向右移动——他瞄准了更右边的地方。让他的射击超出目标！

En: A full suit of armour can't be too agile. You can shift direction faster than he can.
Zh: 穿着全套盔甲不可能太过敏捷。你可以比他更快速地移动方向。

En: Just dodge the first shot -- and the second will be easier. Drunks are quick to anger -- and make mistakes.
Zh: 只要躲开第一枪——第二枪就会容易多了。醉汉很容易发火——还有犯错。

En: I cannot be killed. I have become *immortal*.
Zh: 我不会死的。我已经成为了*不朽*。

En: (Shout.) "Stop shooting at me!"
Zh: （大声呼喊。）“别再朝我开枪了！”

En: He's aiming for the eye-slot in Ruud's helmet. An extremely difficult shot...
Zh: 他瞄准了鲁德头盔上眼窝的位置。一个极度困难的目标……

En: He has to. The rifleman will fire at you again.
Zh: 他必须这样。步枪兵还会朝你开枪的。

En: The helmet looks like the face of an ancient god of war, crying blood.
Zh: 头盔看起来就像是一张远古战神的脸，正在泣血。

En: Let it happen.
Zh: 让它发生。

En: STOP!!!
He's not gonna make it.
Zh: 他挺不住的。

En: Feels slick and warm with blood. The pain is too strong to know what has happened there. Even clutching to your consciousness takes everything you got.
Zh: 血液感觉光滑而温暖。痛苦太过强烈，你根本不知道那里到底发生了什么。甚至保持清醒的意识都已经耗尽了你的一切。

En: Most of what's down there.
Zh: 大部分下面的东西。

En: Oh god...
Zh: 天啦……

En: I don't care. Fuck me.
Zh: 我不在乎。让我去死吧。

En: You can also feel bone where the bullet went in. Something very sharp, like broken teeth under your fingers.
Zh: 你也能感觉到卡在骨头里的子弹。某种非常锋利的东西，比如你手指下面破碎的牙齿。

En: ... it's all gone. Open your eyes now. You have to see what's happening!
Zh: ……全都消失了。现在睁开你的眼睛。你得看看究竟在发生什么！

En: Liquid parts mostly, and you're quickly running out of them. There is a major artery on the inside of the thigh...
Zh: 大部分都是液体，而且很快就流尽了。大腿内侧有一条大动脉……

En: No. No. It's just a fear. Even if... who cares. No one wants you anyway.
Zh: 不。不。这只是一种恐惧。尽管……谁在乎呢。反正也没人需要你。

En: See you on the other side... The necktie disintegrates into molten heat, its last remaining embers letting out a pop and crack that sounds like:
Zh: 我们另一边见了……领带在高温中熔解，最后仅存的余烬发出一阵爆裂声，听起来就像是：

En: It's so dark... I can't see anything.
Zh: “太黑了……我什么也看不见。”

En: Live fast... die *old*. (Wince from pain)
Zh: “放荡生活……英年*晚逝*。”（痛苦的抽搐。）

En: Kim, I lied. About not remembering who I am. I made it up... I remember everything.
Zh: “金，我说不记得是骗你的……其实我全记得。”

En: Stay with me! You feel burning hot tears streaming from your eyes.
Zh: “坚持住！”你感觉自己的眼睛里流下滚烫的热泪。

En: I'm a fucking failure and the love of my life left me.
Zh: “我是个彻头彻尾的败者，我毕生的最爱也离开了我。”

En: Stay with me! The lieutenant pushes down on your wound, hard. "You hear me?! Stay awake! Look at me!"
Zh: “坚持住！”警督用手重重地按住了你的伤口。“你听见了吗？！清醒一点！看着我！”

En: Everyone knows I made it up. I'm just a drunk. A stupid dead drunk.
Zh: “大家都知道是我编的。我只是个醉鬼。一个愚蠢的死醉鬼。”

En: Yes! Keep talking! The lieutenant pushes down on your wound, hard. "Stay awake! Look at me!"
Zh: “是的！继续说！”警督用手重重地按住了你的伤口。“清醒一点！看着我！”

En: It's not all dark yet. As you're leaving, she is in there too with you. You can *feel* the slender figure move, like a snake. And then a distant gunshot. Velvety smooth. Muffled.
Zh: 还不是完全的黑暗。当你离开时，她也在那里，跟你在一起。你能*感觉*到那个纤弱的身影在移动，就像一条蛇。然后是一声遥远的枪响。如天鹅绒般光滑。听不清。

En: NO, you say, and hand out your firearm to him. Your hand trembles and your eyes are full of fear.
Zh: “不”，你说道，然后把枪递给了他。你的手在颤抖，眼里满是恐惧。

En: He just shakes his head, still crouched over you. You hear a distant gunshot. Velvety smooth -- a red circle has appeared on the lieutenant's jacket. It's growing fast.
Zh: 他只是摇摇头，依然蹲伏在你身边。你听见一声遥远的枪响。如天鹅绒般光滑——警督的夹克上出现一个红色的圆圈。正在快速地变大。

En: Shoot... dead. You hear your bloody lips mumble. You try to give him your gun, so he'd understand. But he does not. He does not look into your eyes and see the fear there.
Zh: “开枪……死了。”你听见自己染血的嘴唇在低声嘟囔。你试着把自己的枪给他，希望他能明白。但他没有。他没有看你的眼睛，没有看见里面的恐惧。

En: Do nothing.
Zh: 什么也不做。

En: He turns to his left and says: "Kill him."
Zh: 他转向右边，说道：“杀了他。”

En: There is a black echo. It smells like apricots and it's... always there.\n
Zh: “有一个黑色的回音。闻起来是杏子的味道，而且它……一直在那里。”

En: There's a white shadow that smells like apricots, it's... always there.
Zh: “有一个白色的阴影，闻起来是杏子的味道，它……一直在那里。”

En: Peaceful... It sounds like the armoured figure is weeping.
Zh: “平静……”听起来那个穿盔甲的人在哭泣。

En: Fuck, she was right... That must be the *third* mercenary...
Zh: “该死，她说的没错……肯定还有*第三个*雇佣兵……”

En: ... nest in your abdominal cavity, like a little wild mouse... The masked man's words are barely intelligible, but you can hear them.
Zh: “……在你的腹腔里筑巢，就像一只疯狂的小老鼠……”面具人说的话基本上听不懂，但是你能听见。

En: This third one -- he is the most dangerous of them all. Heavily armed.
Zh: 第三个人——他才是所有人中最危险的那个。全副武装。

En: Ssshhhhh.... The lieutenant raises his left hand.
Zh: “嘘……”警督举起左手。

En: I'm all out of shits to give, loincloth. There's a feverish gleam in his eyes. "Welcome to the fucking reckoning."
Zh: “我他妈已经不在乎了，野人。”他的眼睛里闪烁着极度兴奋的光芒。“欢迎加入这场该死的审判。”

En: SHUT UP!!! You're not gonna talk yourself out of this, loincloth-shit fuck!
Zh: “闭嘴！！！随便叨叨几句就想置身事外，你这个该死的野人！”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: If this turns into a firefight, we should take him out first. He nods.
Zh: 他点点头。“如果演变成一场枪战，我们应该先干掉他。”

En: This is the scab leader. His chest rises and falls under the ceramic breastplate. His fingers reach for the butt of his sidearm.
Zh: 他就是工贼头目。他的胸膛在陶瓷胸甲中起起伏伏，手指伸向了身后的配枪。

En: This is the mercenary at the gates! His chest rises and falls under the ceramic breastplate. His fingers reach for the butt of his sidearm.
Zh: 他就是大门附近的那个雇佣兵！他的胸膛在陶瓷胸甲中起起伏伏，手指伸向了身后的配枪。

En: There's something very wrong with him.
Zh: 他真的非常不对劲。

En: We're out of time. This is...
Zh: “我们没时间了。这是……”

En: ... the mercenary tribunal. The lieutenant nods.
Zh: “……雇佣兵宣判。”警督点点头。

En: What do we do?
Zh: “我们该这么做？”

En: My plan is not to get killed. He puts his hand on his holster. "But we have to intervene."
Zh: “我的计划就是别死。”他把手放在枪套上。“但是我们必须介入。”

En: I think he's calmed down a bit...
Zh: 我觉得他好像冷静了一些……

En: No, he didn't -- he's about to open fire.
Zh: 不，他没有——他要开火了。

En: No, he's calming down. I can talk to him.
Zh: 不，他冷静下来了。我可以跟他聊聊。

En: So which one is it, who's right?
Zh: 到底是哪一个，谁是对的？

En: He is, he's about to snap!
Zh: 他是对的，他就快崩溃了！

En: He is. I was wrong.
Zh: 他是对的。我错了。

En: Oh yes he is, he's about to snap and shoot someone right now.
Zh: 哦耶，他是对的，他很快就会崩溃，马上会朝别人开枪。

En: You can't think that way now, this is serious.
Zh: 你现在不能这么想，这很严肃。

En: ...*PIGFUCK!* is the only word you can make out.
Zh: “……*杂种！*”是你唯一能辨认出的词。

En: ...*PIGFUCK!* is the only word you can make out. It doesn't sound calm.
Zh: “……*杂种！*”是你唯一能辨认出的词。听起来可一点都不冷静。

En: One wrong move and I'm taking you out.
Zh: “只要走错一步，我就把你干掉。”

En: We're gonna tear right through you, I don't give a shit if you're cops.
Zh: “我们会把你撕成碎片，我根本不在乎你是不是警察。”

En: To your left you hear the lieutenant cock his gun.
Zh: 在你左边，你听见警督将他的枪上了膛。

En: You're probably gonna get killed too... I think I'm gonna kill you. I didn't think I had it in me to kill a cop...
Zh: “你可能也会死……我觉得我会杀了你。我没想到自己居然会杀一个警察……”

En: To your left, you hear the lieutenant cock his gun.
Zh: 在你左边，你听见警督将他的枪上了膛。

En: She doesn't seem to understand the severity of the situation.
Zh: 她似乎并不理解情况的严重性。

En: Scream IMMEDIATELY! He's gonna die.
Zh: 赶紧喊出来啊！他会死的。

En: Another soft explosion, like a firecracker goes off in your hand. Another soft *click* from the gleaming white cuirass.
Zh: 又是一阵轻柔的爆炸声，就像鞭炮在你手上炸开一样。闪闪发光的白色胸甲上又响起轻柔的*咔哒声*。

En: This time feels different. You aim higher -- as if pulled by a magnet. Your hand goes numb from the explosion and a plume of smoke erupts from the gun...
Zh: 这次感觉不太一样。你瞄准的更高一些——就像是被磁铁吸附着一样。你的手因为爆炸变得麻木，一股黑烟从枪口冒了出来……

En: You throw the bomb and it's way off.
Zh: 你扔出炸弹，不过飞的有些太远了。

En: (Whisper.) "The big one is the mercenary at the gates!"
Zh: （小声说道。）“那个大块头就在大门旁边的那个雇佣兵！”

En: (Whisper.) "The big one is the mercenary at the gates! The scab leader."
Zh: （小声说道。）“那个大块头就在大门旁边的那个雇佣兵！工贼头目。”

En: (Whisper.) "The big one is the damn *scab leader*."
Zh: （小声说道。）“那个大块头就是那个该死的*工贼头目*！”

En: (Whisper.) "The big one is the damn *scab leader*."
Zh: （小声说道。）“那个大块头就是那个该死的*工贼头目*！”

En: All right! END GAME. Light me on fire and throw me in his face!
Zh: 好吧！游戏结束。把我点燃，然后扔到他的脸上去！

En: Wait. It's a good thing you have an anthropomorphic petrol bomb. It really is. But you have to soften him up first. Present an argument!
Zh: 等等。你有个拟人的汽油弹是好事。真是如此。不过你必须先让他软化一点。提出一个论点！

En: If you waste time people will die.
Zh: 如果浪费时间的话，有人会死的。

En: No. We can do this. Drag it out a little. Get under his skin.
Zh: 不。我们可以的。再拖延一下。激怒他。

En: Even if it comes to a fight it's a good idea to get under his skin first.
Zh: 就算要打，先激怒他是个不错的主意。

En: I don't know about this getting under his skin. What if he gets under *yours*? I'm barely keeping your hand from trembling here...
Zh: 要不要激怒他这一点我不清楚。如果他激怒*你*了呢？让你的手不颤抖已经很勉强了……

En: I'm barely keeping you together here. If you talk to him, he will rattle *you*, not the other way around.
Zh: 我这里让你不崩溃就已经很勉强了。如果跟他聊，慌乱的可能会是*你*，而不是反过来的。

En: Yes, yes! Just throw the bomb at him. I'm barely keep you together here -- no time to talk. He will only rattle you.
Zh: 是的，是的！直接朝他扔炸弹吧。我让你不崩溃已经很勉强了——没时间说什么话。他只会让你更慌乱。

En: Whatever you do -- stop wasting your time *thinking* about it.
Zh: 不管你做什么——别浪费时间*考虑*了。

En: No, please. Peace -- it has worked this far. Start with the first idea you have, move down from that...
Zh: 不，拜托。要和平解决——这么久以来一直都成功了。从你脑海中的第一个想法开始，然后慢慢继续……

En: No. We can do this. Drag it out a bit. Get under his skin.
Zh: 不。我们可以的。再拖延一点时间。激怒他。

En: I'm barely keeping you together here... this is *it*. The big one. If you talk to him, he will rattle *you*, not the other way around.
Zh: 我这里让你不崩溃就已经很勉强了……就是*它*了。大事件。如果跟他聊，慌乱的可能会是*你*，而不是反过来的。

En: Even if it comes to a fight it's *always* a good idea to drag it out first. Get under his skin.
Zh: 就算要打，先拖延一下时间*总是*好的。激怒他。

En: I don't know about this getting under his skin. What if he gets under *yours*? I'm barely keeping your hand from trembling here...
Zh: 要不要激怒他这一点我不清楚。如果他激怒*你*了呢？让你的手不颤抖已经很勉强了……

En: Peace. Always peace -- it has worked thus far. Start with the first idea you have, then move down from that, please...
Zh: 和平。永远的和平——这么久以来都成功了。从你脑海中的第一个想法开始，然后慢慢继续，拜托了……

En: If you waste time people will die.
Zh: 如果浪费时间的话，有人会死的。

En: Whatever you do -- stop wasting your time *thinking* about it.
Zh: 不管你做什么——别浪费时间*考虑*了。

En: No, wait! It's good you have that gun. It really is. Just soften him up first. Present an argument!
Zh: 不，等等！有枪是好事。真是如此。不过你必须先让他软化一点。提出一个论点！

En: Yes, yes! Just shoot him. I'm barely keeping you together here -- no time to talk. He will only rattle you.
Zh: 是的，是的！直接朝他开枪。我让你不崩溃已经很勉强了——没时间说什么话。他只会让你更慌乱。

En: No, no. It's okay. Soften him up and trust the others to attack if it comes to that. Make him talk! Present an argument!
Zh: 不不不。没关系的。先软化他，如果真到了那一步，相信其他人会发起进攻的。让他开口说话！提出一个论点！

En: If you waste time, people will die. And they will still attack you later.
Zh: 如果浪费时间的话，有人会死的。而且之后他们还是会攻击你。

En: I'm barely keeping you together here. The more you talk the harder it will get, I'm afraid...
Zh: 我这里让你不崩溃就已经很勉强了。你说的越多，我就越难控制，我恐怕……

En: Whatever you do -- stop wasting your time *thinking* about it.
Zh: 不管你做什么——别浪费时间*考虑*了。

En: I don't know about this getting under his skin... He'll only get under *yours*. I'm barely keeping you together here. This is *it*.
Zh: 要不要激怒他这一点我不清楚……他只会激怒*你*，而且我让你不崩溃已经很勉强了。就是*它*了。

En: Peace. Always peace -- it has worked thus far. Start with the first idea you have, move down from that, please...
Zh: 和平。永远的和平——这么久以来都成功了。从你脑海中的第一个想法开始，然后慢慢继续，拜托了……

En: No. We can do this. Drag it out a bit. Get under his skin.
Zh: 不。我们可以的。再拖延一点时间。激怒他。

En: I'm barely keeping you together here... this is *it*. If you talk to him, he will rattle *you*, not the other way around.
Zh: 我这里让你不崩溃就已经很勉强了……就是*它*了。如果跟他聊，慌乱的可能会是*你*，而不是反过来的。

En: Even if it comes to a fight it's *always* a good idea to drag it out. Get under his skin.
Zh: 就算要打，先拖延一下时间*总是*好的。激怒他。

En: Fuck, there are *three* of them... I was hoping there would be... less. The lieutenant points to the helmeted figure.
Zh: “该死，他们有*三个人*……我本来希望会……更少一些。”警督指向那个戴头盔的身影。

En: This third one -- he is the most dangerous of them all. Heavily armed.
Zh: 第三个人——他才是他们中间最危险的那个。全副武装。

En: You've brought backup. (Point to the masked man.) "From outta town."
Zh: “你叫了增援。”（指向戴面具的人。）“从外面来的。”

En: Who is that? (Point to the man) "I didn't know you had a third guy."
Zh: “那是谁？”（指向那个人）“我不知道你还有第三个人。”

En: He is facing overwhelmingly superior firepower -- and he knows it.
Zh: 他面对的是压倒性的火力——而且他知道这一点。

En: Even at this distance, you can still make out the ugly tie suspended in blue liquid. It looks extremely worried.
Zh: 即使离的很远，你还是能辨别出那条漂浮在蓝色液体里的丑陋领带。它看起来非常担心。

En: What?
Zh: 什么？

En: Like how did I get you, or...?
Zh: 比如我是怎么得到你的，或者……？

En: The man it was supposed to hit is looking over his shoulder -- to see where it went. And he can't see it! It's THAT OFF.
Zh: 那个应该被击中的人回头张望——看看它去了哪里。而且他没看见！就有那么远。

En: Get ready for a world of pain, man.
Zh: 准备好迎接痛苦的世界吧，老兄。

En: 0.6 seconds remain. There are six little black dots in the tip of the thick barrel, like a honeycomb. This is a *nock cannon*. It shoots six rounds in one pull of the trigger.
Zh: 还剩下0.6秒。厚厚的枪管顶端有六个小黑点，就像一个蜂巢。这是一支*诺克机枪*。只要扣动一次扳机，就能射出6枚子弹。

En: In the fiery inferno you see your tie -- coiling around the man's neck. It is no longer horrific, but beautiful and *pure*.
Zh: 在炙热的炼狱中，你看见自己的领带——缠绕在男人的脖子上。它不再让你感觉到恐怖，而是美丽又*纯洁*。

En: No. Not a disaster. Weave this into the story of you. Walk out of its *ruins*. Save those who still can be saved -- *I'm* on your side.
Zh: 不。不是一场灾难。把它编织进你的人生故事里。走出它的*废墟*。拯救那些仍然还能被拯救的人——*我*会站在你这边。

En: And the lieutenant too. And the men behind your back, drawing their weapons... you can live. You can get out of this.
Zh: 警督也是。还有你背后的那些人，掏出了他们的武器……你可以活下来。你可以摆脱这一切。

En: My name, should you know it, is Joopson AS Men's Fashion, model "Colourful Tie." Catalogue no. J327.
Zh: 我的名字，你应该知道的，是乔普森AS男装，款式是“鲜艳领带”。产品编号J327

En: I know so little about you. How did we meet?
Zh: 我对你了解的不多。我们是怎么遇见的？

En: One day a sad man walked into a clothing store. He looked really down. Like he hadn't had fun in years. He needed someone to show him how to rock and roll again.
Zh: 有一天，一个悲伤的男人走进一家服装店。他看上去真的很失落。好像已经很多年没有开心过了。他需要某个人，教会他如何再摇滚起来。

En: Joopson AS catalogue no. J327 shone on the tie rack, trying to get his attention. The sad man picked it up and put it on. He looked at himself in the mirror. Didn't smile.
Zh: 乔普森AS产品编号J327在领带架上闪闪发光，试着吸引他的注意力。悲伤的男人拿起它，戴在脖子上。他看着镜子里的自己。脸上没有笑容。

En: This is gonna be fun.
Zh: 这一定会很有趣的。

En: I'm young again.
Zh: 我又年轻了。

En: And from that moment on -- we rode together. The rest of your clothes were still *normal* back then. But we took care of that soon enough.
Zh: 从那一刻起——我们并肩前行。那个时候，你的其他衣服还很*普通*。不过很快我们就解决了那个问题。

En: Nothing will ever heal me, but at least I'll have a funny tie.
Zh: 没有什么能治愈我，不过至少，我会拥有一条滑稽的领带。

En: Normal police officer clothes just don't go well with a multi-patterned disco tie made of 98.7% pure flammable polyester.
Zh: 普通警服跟一条由98.7%纯易燃涤纶制成的花纹迪斯科领带很不相配。

En: Did we... have any fun?
Zh: 那我们……过得愉快吗？

En: Truthfully? Not a lot. I did everything a multi-patterned necktie can do to help a man. I mean, I tried to get you to do *all* the fun things:
Zh: 说真话吗？没那么愉快。作为一条花纹领带，我尽一切努力去帮你了。我的意思是，我试过让你去做*所有*那些有趣的事情：

En: Drink beer, drink wine, drink cider, go to parties with young people around and drink beer *and* cider; do drugs too, so you don't fall asleep... You had *some* fun. But not enough to heal you.
Zh: 喝啤酒，喝葡萄酒，喝苹果酒，跟周围的年轻人一起参加派对，喝啤酒*和*苹果酒；还磕了药，这样你就不会睡着……你有过*某些*快乐。不过还是不够治愈你。

En: No, no. It was her mostly. Don't lie to him, necktie.
Zh: 不不不。主要还是她。别骗他了，领带。

En: Smells like a steak on the grill. The burning flesh in your nostrils....
Zh: 闻起来就像烤架上的牛排。你鼻孔里燃烧的肉……

En: Yeah, his body contorts in a very disturbing manner -- there's no mincing words with this one. He's dying a horrible painful death as you're talking to your tie in your head.
Zh: 是啊，他的身体以一种非常令人不安的方式扭曲着——这里就用不着什么娇弱造作的词汇了。他正在极度恐怖的痛苦中死去，而你还在脑子里跟自己的领带对话。

En: Harry, for god's sake... WATCH OUT!
Zh: 哈里，看在上天的份上……小心！

En: Like dice rolling.
Zh: 就像骰子在滚动。

En: The kinetic energy of the 9mm front-loaded bullet is distributed evenly across the chest piece and into his hands.
Zh: 9毫米前膛枪子弹的动能均匀地分散在胸甲和他的手中。

En: It didn't do *anything*? (Look at the gun.)
Zh: “它*什么*也没做？”（看着枪。）

En: Do it, primitive... He points to his chest. "Take me out."
Zh: “动手吧，简单点……”他指着自己的胸口。“干掉我。”

En: It's not easy. He has 0.6 seconds to do so. He won't make it. You're on your own.
Zh: 这不容易。他只有0.6秒的反应时间。他做不到的。你只能靠自己了。

En: Why did I not find my lost gun... (Just stand there.)
Zh: “我为什么没找到失枪呢……”（就这么站着。）

En: What's that, loincloth? I can't hear you. Sounds like you got your mouth full of dick. Ruud...
Zh: “这是干什么，野人？我听不见你说话。听起来你已经满嘴都是屎了吧。鲁德……”

En: What's the matter, loincloth? Mouth full of dick? He croaks. "Think I'm gonna fucking spare you?!"
Zh: “怎么了，野人？满嘴是屎说不出话来了？”他嘶哑地说道。“以为我会放过你吗？！”

En: God dammit. I did my best. I just need more time to solve the murder.
Zh: “该死。我尽力了。只要再给我点时间，我就能破获这起凶杀案。”

En: Let me help you then... The man looks to his left. "Kill him."
Zh: “那就让我帮帮你……”男人看向右边。“杀了他。”

En: He's trying to find a straight line of sight before the rifleman can take you out. In the background, the leader is still on fire...
Zh: 他试着在步枪兵干掉你之前找出一条清晰的瞄准线。在背后，领头人还在燃烧……

En: He's trying to find a straight line of sight before the rifleman can take you out. In the background, the leader staggers...
Zh: 他试着在步枪兵干掉你之前找出一条清晰的瞄准线。在背后，领头人步伐蹒跚……

En: It's not easy. He has 0.4 seconds to do so. He won't make it. You're on your own.
Zh: 这不容易。他只有0.4秒的反应时间。他做不到的。你只能靠自己了。

En: 0.4 seconds remain. There are six little black dots in the tip of the barrel, like a honeycomb. This is a *nock cannon*. It shoots six rounds in one pull of the trigger.
